title: 第1题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Suppose \(a\) and \(b\) are real numbers. When the polynomial \(x^3 + x^2 + ax + b\) is divided by \(x - 1\), the remainder is \(4\). When the polynomial is divided by \(x - 2\), the remainder is \(6\). What is \(b - a\)?
q_zh: 设\(a\)和\(b\)是实数。当多项式\(x^3 + x^2 + ax + b\)除以\(x - 1\)时，余数为\(4\)。当该多项式除以\(x - 2\)时，余数为\(6\)。\(b - a\)是多少？

title: 第2题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Let \(f(x) = 100x^3 - 300x^2 + 200x\). For how many real numbers \(a\) does the graph of \(y = f(x - a)\) pass through the point \((1, 25)\)?

title: 第3题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The sequence \(1, x, y, z\) is arithmetic. The sequence \(1, p, q, z\) is geometric. Both sequences are strictly increasing and contain only integers, and \(z\) is as small as possible. What is the value of \(x + y + z + p + q\)?
q_zh: 序列\(1, x, y, z\)是等差数列。序列\(1, p, q, z\)是等比数列。两个序列都是严格递增的且只包含整数，\(z\)尽可能小。\(x + y + z + p + q\)的值是多少？

title: 第4题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Let \(f(n) = n^3 - 5n^2 + 2n + 8\) and \(g(n) = n^3 - 6n^2 + 5n + 12\). What is the sum of all integers \(n\) such that \(\dfrac{f(n)}{g(n)}\) is an integer?

title: 第5题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: The number \(2024\) is written as the sum of not necessarily distinct two-digit numbers. What is the least number of two-digit numbers needed to write this sum?
q_zh: 数字2024被写成若干个（不一定不同的）两位数之和。写出这个和所需的最少两位数个数是多少？

title: 第6题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: What is the minimum number of successive swaps of adjacent letters in the string \(ABCDEF\) that are needed to change the string to \(FEDCBA?\) (For example, \(3\) swaps are required to change \(ABC\) to \(CBA;\) one such sequence of swaps is \(ABC\to BAC\to BCA\to CBA.\) )
q_zh: 将字符串\(ABCDEF\)变为\(FEDCBA\)所需的最少相邻字母交换次数是多少？（例如，将\(ABC\)变为\(CBA\)需要3次交换，一种交换序列是\(ABC \rightarrow BAC \rightarrow BCA \rightarrow CBA\)。）

title: 第7题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: The product of three integers is \(60\). What is the least possible positive sum of the three integers?
q_zh: 三个整数的乘积是60。这三个整数的最小可能正和是多少？

title: 第8题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Amy, Bomani, Charlie, and Daria work in a chocolate factory. On Monday Amy, Bomani, and Charlie started working at \(1:00\text{ PM}\) and were able to pack \(4\), \(3\), and \(3\) packages, respectively, every \(3\) minutes. At some later time, Daria joined the group, and Daria was able to pack \(5\) packages every \(4\) minutes. Together, they finished packing \(450\) packages at exactly \(2:45\text{ PM}\). At what time did Daria join the group?
q_zh: Amy、Bomani、Charlie和Daria在一家巧克力工厂工作。星期一，Amy、Bomani和Charlie在下午1:00开始工作，他们分别能够每3分钟包装4、3和3包。在某个稍后的时间，Daria加入了团队，Daria能够每4分钟包装5包。他们一起在下午2:45恰好包装完450包。Daria是什么时候加入团队的？

title: 第9题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Real numbers \(a\), \(b,\) and \(c\) have arithmetic mean \(0\). The arithmetic mean of \(a^2, b^2,\) and \(c^2\) is \(10\). What is the arithmetic mean of \(ab, ac,\) and \(bc\)?
q_zh: 实数\(a\)、\(b\)和\(c\)的算术平均数是0。\(a^2\)、\(b^2\)和\(c^2\)的算术平均数是10。\(ab\)、\(ac\)和\(bc\)的算术平均数是多少？

title: 第10题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Barb the baker has developed a new temperature scale for her bakery called the Breadus scale, which is a linear function of the Fahrenheit scale. Bread rises at \(110\) degrees Fahrenheit, which is \(0\) degrees on the Breadus scale. Bread is baked at \(350\) degrees Fahrenheit, which is \(100\) degrees on the Breadus scale. Bread is done when its internal temperature is \(200\) degrees Fahrenheit. What is this, in degrees, on the Breadus scale?
q_zh: 面包师Barb为她的面包店开发了一种新的温度标度，称为Breadus标度，它是华氏标度的线性函数。面包在110华氏度时发酵，对应Breadus标度的0度。面包在350华氏度时烘烤，对应Breadus标度的100度。当面包内部温度达到200华氏度时面包就烤好了。这在Breadus标度上是多少度？

title: 第11题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Maureen is keeping track of the mean of her quiz scores this semester. If Maureen scores an \(11\) on the next quiz, her mean will increase by \(1\). If she scores an \(11\) on each of the next three quizzes, her mean will increase by \(2\). What is the mean of her quiz scores currently?
q_zh: Maureen正在记录她本学期小测验分数的平均值。如果Maureen在下次测验中得\(11\)分，她的平均分将增加\(1\)分。如果她在接下来三次测验中都得\(11\)分，她的平均分将增加\(2\)分。她目前的测验分数平均值是多少？

title: 第12题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: Maddy and Lara see a list of numbers written on a blackboard. Maddy adds \(3\) to each number in the list and finds that the sum of her new numbers is \(45\). Lara multiplies each number in the list by \(3\) and finds that the sum of her new numbers is also \(45\). How many numbers are written on the blackboard?
q_zh: Maddy和Lara看到黑板上写着一列数。Maddy将列表中的每个数加3，发现她的新数之和为45。Lara将列表中的每个数乘以3，发现她的新数之和也是45。黑板上写了多少个数？

title: 第13题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Let  \(L_1 = 1\), \(L_2 = 3\), and \(L_{n+2} = L_{n+1}+L_n\) for \(n \geq 1\). How many terms in the sequence \(L_1, L_2, L_3, \cdots, L_{2023}\) are even?

title: 第14题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: When the roots of the polynomial \[P(x) = (x-1)^1 (x-2)^2 (x-3)^3 \cdot \cdot \cdot (x-10)^{10}\] are removed from the number line, what remains is the union of 11 disjoint open intervals. On how many of these intervals is \(P(x)\) positive?
q_zh: 当多项式\[P(x) = (x-1)^1 (x-2)^2 (x-3)^3 \cdot \cdot \cdot (x-10)^{10}\]的根从数轴上去除后，剩下的是11个不相交的开区间的并集。在这些区间中，有多少个区间上\(P(x)\)为正？

title: 第15题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: The sum of three numbers is 96. The first number is 6 times the third number, and the third number is 40 less than the second number. What is the absolute value of the difference between the first and second numbers?
q_zh: 三个数之和为96。第一个数是第三个数的6倍，而第三个数比第二个数小40。第一个数与第二个数之差的绝对值是多少？

title: 第16题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: A data set consists of \(6\) (not distinct) positive integers: \(1\), \(7\), \(5\), \(2\), \(5\), and \(X\). The average (arithmetic mean) of the \(6\) numbers equals a value in the data set. What is the sum of all possible values of \(X\)?
q_zh: 一个数据集由 \(6\) 个（不一定是不同的）正整数组成：\(1\)、\(7\)、\(5\)、\(2\)、\(5\) 和 \(X\)。这 \(6\) 个数的平均值（算术平均）等于数据集中的一个值。求 \(X\) 所有可能值的和。

title: 第17题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Ted mistakenly wrote \(2^m\cdot\sqrt{\dfrac{1}{4096}}\) as \(2\cdot\sqrt[m]{\dfrac{1}{4096}}\). What is the sum of all real numbers \(m\) for which these two expressions have the same value?
q_zh: 泰德误把 \(2^m\cdot\sqrt{\dfrac{1}{4096}}\) 写成了 \(2\cdot\sqrt[m]{\dfrac{1}{4096}}\)。对于所有使这两个表达式值相等的实数 \(m\)，求它们的和。

title: 第18题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: Define \(x\diamond y\) to be \(|x-y|\) for all real numbers \(x\) and \(y.\) What is the value of \[(1\diamond(2\diamond3))-((1\diamond2)\diamond3)?\]
q_zh: 定义 \(x\diamond y\) 为 \(|x-y|\)（对所有实数 \(x\) 和 \(y\)）。求 \[(1\diamond(2\diamond3))-((1\diamond2)\diamond3)\] 的值。

title: 第19题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: How many of the first ten numbers of the sequence 121, 11211, 1112111, … are prime numbers?
q_zh: 序列121、11211、1112111、…的前十个数字中有多少个是质数？

title: 第20题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: For how many values of the constant k will the polynomial x\(^{2}\) + kx + 36 have two distinct integer roots?
q_zh: 对于常数k的多少个值，多项式x² + kx + 36会有两个不同的整数根？

title: 第21题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Camila writes down five positive integers. The unique mode of these integers is \(2\) greater than their median, and the median is \(2\) greater than their arithmetic mean. What is the least possible value for the mode?
q_zh: 卡米拉写下五个正整数。这些整数中唯一的众数比它们的中位数大 \(2\)，且中位数比它们的算术平均数大 \(2\)。众数的最小可能值是多少？

title: 第22题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Mr. Lopez has a choice of two routes to get to work. Route A is \(6\) miles long, and his average speed along this route is \(30\) miles per hour. Route B is \(5\) miles long, and his average speed along this route is \(40\) miles per hour, except for a \(\frac{1}{2}\)-mile stretch in a school zone where his average speed is \(20\) miles per hour. By how many minutes is Route B quicker than Route A?
q_zh: Lopez 先生上班有两条路可选。路线 A 长 \(6\) 英里，平均速度为每小时 \(30\) 英里。路线 B 长 \(5\) 英里，平均速度为每小时 \(40\) 英里，但其中有 \(\frac12\) 英里的学校区域限速为每小时 \(20\) 英里。路线 B 比路线 A 快多少分钟？

title: 第23题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: How many ordered pairs \((x,y)\) of real numbers satisfy the following system of equations? \begin{align*} x^2+3y&=9 \\ (|x|+|y|-4)^2 &= 1 \end{align*}
q_zh: 有多少个实数有序对 \((x,y)\) 满足以下方程组？\begin{align*} x^2+3y&=9 \\ (|x|+|y|-4)^2 &= 1 \end{align*}

title: 第24题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The graph of \[f(x) = |\lfloor x \rfloor| - |\lfloor 1 - x \rfloor|\] is symmetric about which of the following? (Here \(\lfloor x \rfloor\) is the greatest integer not exceeding \(x\).)
q_zh: 函数 \[f(x) = |\lfloor x \rfloor| - |\lfloor 1 - x \rfloor|\] 的图像关于以下哪一项对称？（其中 \(\lfloor x\rfloor\) 为不超过 \(x\) 的最大整数。）

title: 第25题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: At noon on a certain day, Minneapolis is \(N\) degrees warmer than St. Louis. At \(4{:}00\) the temperature in Minneapolis has fallen by \(5\) degrees while the temperature in St. Louis has risen by \(3\) degrees, at which time the temperatures in the two cities differ by \(2\) degrees. What is the product of all possible values of \(N?\)
q_zh: 某天中午，Minneapolis 比 St. Louis 暖和 \(N\) 度。到下午 \(4:00\)，Minneapolis 气温下降了 \(5\) 度，St. Louis 气温上升了 \(3\) 度，此时两城市气温相差 \(2\) 度。求 \(N\) 的所有可能值的乘积。

title: 第26题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: The quiz scores of a class with \(k > 12\) students have a mean of 8. The mean of a collection of 12 of these quiz scores is 14. What is the mean of the remaining quiz scores in terms of \(k\)?
q_zh: 一个超过12名学生的班级的测验分数平均分为8分。从中抽取12个测验分数，其平均分为14分。以\(k\)表示剩余测验分数的平均分是多少？

title: 第27题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: What is the least possible value of \((xy-1)^{2}+(x+y)^{2}\) for real numbers \(x\) and \(y\)?
q_zh: 对于实数\(x\)和\(y\)，\((xy-1)^{2}+(x+y)^{2}\)的最小可能值是多少？

title: 第28题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: All the roots of the polynomial \(z^{6}-10z^{5}+Az^{4}+Bz^{3}+Cz^{2}+Dz+16\) are positive integers, possibly repeated. What is the value of \(B\)?
q_zh: 多项式\(z^{6}-10z^{5}+Az^{4}+Bz^{3}+Cz^{2}+Dz+16\)的所有根都是正整数（可能重复）。\(B\)的值是多少？

title: 第29题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Ms. Blackwell gives an exam to two classes. The mean of the scores of the students in the morning class is 84, and the afternoon class's mean score is 70. The ratio of the number of students in the morning class to the number of students in the afternoon class is \(\frac{3}{4}\). What is the mean of the scores of all the students?
q_zh: 布莱克威尔老师给两个班进行考试。上午班学生分数的平均分为84，下午班学生分数的平均分为70。上午班学生人数与下午班学生人数之比为\(\frac{3}{4}\)。所有学生的平均分是多少？

title: 第30题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Let \(N = 34 \cdot 34 \cdot 63 \cdot 270\). What is the ratio of the sum of the odd divisors of \(N\) to the sum of the even divisors of \(N\)?
q_zh: 设\(N = 34 \cdot 34 \cdot 63 \cdot 270\)。\(N\)的奇因子之和与偶因子之和的比是多少？

title: 第31题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The real number \(x\) satisfies the equation \(x + \dfrac{1}{x} = \sqrt{5}\). What is the value of \(x^{11} - 7x^{7} + x^{3}\)?

title: 第32题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: The numbers 3, 5, 7, a, and b have an average (arithmetic mean) of 15. What is the average of a and b?
q_zh: 数3、5、7、a和b的平均数（算术平均）是15。a和b的平均数是多少？

title: 第33题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: What is the sum of all real numbers \(x\) for which \(|x^{2} - 12x + 34| = 2\)?

title: 第34题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: The ratio of \(w\) to \(x\) is 4:3, the ratio of \(y\) to \(z\) is 3:2, and the ratio of \(z\) to \(x\) is 1:6. What is the ratio of \(w\) to \(y\)?

title: 第35题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Driving along a highway, Megan noticed that her odometer showed 15951 (miles). This number is a palindrome — it reads the same forward and backward. Then 2 hours later, the odometer displayed the next higher palindrome. What was her average speed, in miles per hour, during this 2-hour period?
q_zh: Megan在高速公路上行驶时，注意到她的里程表显示15951（英里）。这个数字是回文数——正读和反读都一样。2小时后，里程表显示了下一个更高的回文数。在这2小时期间，她的平均速度是多少英里/小时？

title: 第36题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: How many ordered pairs of integers \((x, y)\) satisfy the equation \[x^{2020} + y^{2} = 2y?\]
q_zh: 有多少个整数有序对\((x, y)\)满足方程 \[x^{2020} + y^{2} = 2y?\]

title: 第37题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Melanie computes the mean \(\mu\), the median \(M\), and the modes of the 365 values that are the dates in the months of 2019. Thus her data consists of 12 1s, 12 2s, . . . , 12 28s, 11 29s, 11 30s, and 7 31s. Let \(d\) be the median of the modes. Which of the following statements is true?
q_zh: Melanie计算了365个数值（即2019年各月日期）的均值\(\mu\)、中位数\(M\)和众数。因此她的数据包括：12个1、12个2、...、12个28、11个29、11个30和7个31。设\(d\)为众数的中位数。以下哪个陈述是正确的？

title: 第38题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: There is a real \(n\) such that \((n + 1)! + (n + 2)! = n! \cdot 440\). What is the sum of the digits of \(n\)?
q_zh: 存在一个实数\(n\)使得\((n + 1)! + (n + 2)! = n! \cdot 440\)。求\(n\)的数位之和。

title: 第39题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The function \(f\) is defined by \(f(x) = \lfloor|x|\rfloor - |\lfloor x\rfloor|\) for all real numbers \(x\), where \(\lfloor r\rfloor\) denotes the greatest integer less than or equal to the real number \(r\). What is the range of \(f\)?
q_zh: 函数\(f\)定义为对于所有实数\(x\)，\(f(x) = \lfloor|x|\rfloor - |\lfloor x\rfloor|\)，其中\(\lfloor r\rfloor\)表示小于或等于实数\(r\)的最大整数。求\(f\)的值域。
options: B. The set of nonpositive integers
E. The set of nonnegative integers

title: 第40题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Two jars each contain the same number of marbles, and every marble is either blue or green. In Jar 1 the ratio of blue to green marbles is 9:1, and the ratio of blue to green marbles in Jar 2 is 8:1. There are 95 green marbles in all. How many more blue marbles are in Jar 1 than in Jar 2?
q_zh: 两个罐子各有相同数量的弹珠，每个弹珠非蓝即绿。在罐子1中，蓝绿弹珠的比例是9:1，在罐子2中，蓝绿弹珠的比例是8:1。总共有95个绿弹珠。罐子1比罐子2多多少个蓝弹珠？

title: 第41题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Suppose that real number \(x\) satisfies \(\sqrt{49 - x^{2}} - \sqrt{25 - x^{2}} = 3\). What is the value of \(\sqrt{49 - x^{2}} + \sqrt{25 - x^{2}}\)?

title: 第42题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en:
How many ordered pairs of real numbers \((x,y)\) satisfy the following system of equations?
\[\begin{align*} x+3y &= 3 \\ \big||x|-|y|\big| &= 1 \end{align*}\]
q_zh:
有多少个实数有序对\((x,y)\)满足以下方程组？
\[\begin{align*} x+3y &= 3 \\ \big||x|-|y|\big| &= 1 \end{align*}\]

title: 第43题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Sam drove 96 miles in 90 minutes. His average speed during the first 30 minutes was 60 mph (miles per hour), and his average speed during the second 30 minutes was 65 mph. What was his average speed, in mph, during the last 30 minutes?
q_zh: Sam在90分钟内行驶了96英里。他前30分钟的平均速度是60英里/小时，第二个30分钟的平均速度是65英里/小时。他最后30分钟的平均速度是多少英里/小时？

title: 第44题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: The sum of two nonzero real numbers is \(4\) times their product. What is the sum of the reciprocals of the two numbers?
q_zh: 两个非零实数的和是它们乘积的4倍。这两个数的倒数的和是多少？

title: 第45题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Sofia ran 5 laps around the 400-meter track at her school. For each lap, she ran the first 100 meters at an average speed of 4 meters per second and the remaining 300 meters at an average speed of 5 meters per second. How much time did Sofia take running the 5 laps?
q_zh: Sofia绕着她学校的400米跑道跑了5圈。每一圈，她以平均每秒4米的速度跑前100米，以平均每秒5米的速度跑剩下的300米。Sofia跑完5圈用了多少时间？

title: 第46题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: Suppose that \(x\) and \(y\) are nonzero real numbers such that \(\dfrac{3x + y}{x - 3y} = -2\). What is the value of \(\dfrac{x + 3y}{3x - y}\)?
q_zh: 假设\(x\)和\(y\)是非零实数，使得\(\dfrac{3x + y}{x - 3y} = -2\)。求\(\dfrac{x + 3y}{3x - y}\)的值。

title: 第47题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: The mean, median, and mode of the 7 data values \(60, 100, x, 40, 50, 200, 90\) are all equal to \(x\). What is the value of \(x\)?
q_zh: 7个数据值\(60, 100, x, 40, 50, 200, 90\)的平均数、中位数和众数都等于\(x\)。\(x\)的值是多少？

title: 第48题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: The mean age of Amanda's \(4\) cousins is \(8\), and their median age is \(5\). What is the sum of the ages of Amanda's youngest and oldest cousins?
q_zh: Amanda的4位表亲的平均年龄是8岁，中位数年龄是5岁。Amanda最年幼和最年长的表亲的年龄之和是多少？

title: 第49题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: The ratio of the measures of two acute angles is \(5:4\), and the complement of one of these two angles is twice as large as the complement of the other. What is the sum of the degree measures of the two angles?
q_zh: 两个锐角的度数之比为\(5:4\)，其中一个角的余角的大小是另一个角的余角的两倍。这两个角的度数之和是多少？

title: 第50题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: Mr. Patrick teaches math to 15 students. He was grading tests and found that when he graded everyone's test except Payton's, the average grade for the class was 80. After he graded Payton's test, the test average became 81. What was Payton's score on the test?
q_zh: 帕特里克先生给班上15名学生批改数学试卷。他发现：批完除佩顿之外所有人的试卷后，班级平均分为80分。批完佩顿的试卷后，全班平均分变为81分。问佩顿的卷面成绩是多少分？

title: 第51题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: The sum of two positive numbers is 5 times their difference. What is the ratio of the larger number to the smaller number?
q_zh: 两个正数的和等于这两个数之差的5倍。求较大数与较小数的比值。

title: 第52题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: How many terms are there in the arithmetic sequence \(13, 16, 19, \dots, 70, 73\)?
q_zh: 等差数列 \(13, 16, 19, \dots, 70, 73\) 中共有多少项？

title: 第53题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Two years ago Pete was three times as old as his cousin Claire. 2 years before that, Pete was four times as old as Claire. In how many years will the ratio of their ages be \(2:1\)?
q_zh: 两年前，皮特的年龄是表妹克莱尔的3倍。再往前推两年（即四年前），皮特的年龄是克莱尔的4倍。再过多少年，两人年龄之比将变为 \(2:1\)？

title: 第54题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Isaac has written down one integer two times and another integer three times. The sum of the five numbers is 100, and one of the numbers is 28. What is the other number?
q_zh: Isaac写下一个整数两次，又写下另一个整数三次。五个数的和是100，其中一个数是28。另一个数是多少？

title: 第55题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: Four siblings ordered an extra large pizza. Alex ate \(\dfrac{1}{5}\), Beth \(\dfrac{1}{3}\), and Cyril \(\dfrac{1}{4}\) of the pizza. Dan got the leftovers. What is the sequence of the siblings in decreasing order of the part of pizza they consumed?
q_zh: 四个兄弟姐妹点了一个超大披萨。Alex吃了披萨的\(\dfrac{1}{5}\)，Beth吃了\(\dfrac{1}{3}\)，Cyril吃了\(\dfrac{1}{4}\)。Dan得到了剩下的部分。他们每人吃的披萨比例按从大到小的顺序是什么？

title: 第56题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: The harmonic mean of a collection of numbers is the reciprocal of the arithmetic mean of the reciprocals of the numbers in the collection. For example, the harmonic mean of \(4, 4,\) and \(5\) is \(\dfrac{1}{\frac{1}{3}\left(\frac{1}{4} + \frac{1}{4} + \frac{1}{5} \right)} = \dfrac{30}{7}\). What is the harmonic mean of all the real roots of the \(4050\)th degree polynomial \[\prod_{k=1}^{2025}(kx^2 - 4x - 3) = (x^2 - 4x - 3)(2x^2 - 4x - 3)(3x^2 - 4x - 3)\cdots(2025x^2 - 4x - 3)?\]
q_zh: 一组数的调和平均数是这组数的倒数的算术平均数的倒数。例如，\(4, 4,\)和\(5\)的调和平均数是\(\dfrac{1}{\frac{1}{3}\left(\frac{1}{4} + \frac{1}{4} + \frac{1}{5} \right)} = \dfrac{30}{7}\)。\(4050\)次多项式\(\prod_{k=1}^{2025}(kx^2 - 4x - 3)\)的所有实根的调和平均数是多少？

title: 第57题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: Consider a decreasing sequence of \(n\) positive integers \(x_1 \gt x_2 \gt \cdots \gt x_n\) that satisfies the following conditions: The average of the first \(3\) terms in the sequence is \(2025\). For all \(4 \le k \le n,\) the average of the first \(k\) terms is \(1\) less than the average of the first \(k - 1\) terms. What is the greatest possible value of \(n\)?
q_zh: 考虑一个由\(n\)个正整数组成的递减序列\(x_1 \gt x_2 \gt \cdots \gt x_n\)，满足以下条件：序列前\(3\)项的平均值为\(2025\)；对所有\(4 \le k \le n\)，前\(k\)项的平均值比前\(k - 1\)项的平均值小\(1\)。\(n\)的最大可能值是多少？

title: 第58题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: The first three terms of a geometric sequence are the integers \(a, 720\) and \(b\), where \(a < 720 < b\). What is the sum of the digits of the least possible value of \(b\)?
q_zh: 一个等比数列的前三项是整数\(a\)、720和\(b\)，其中\(a < 720 < b\)。\(b\)的最小可能值的各位数字之和是多少？

title: 第59题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Positive integers \(x\) and \(y\) satisfy the equation \(\sqrt{x} + \sqrt{y} = \sqrt{1183}\). What is the minimum possible value of \(x+y\)?
q_zh: 正整数\(x\)和\(y\)满足方程\(\sqrt{x} + \sqrt{y} = \sqrt{1183}\)。\(x + y\)的最小可能值是多少？

title: 第60题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: A list of \(9\) real numbers consists of \(1\), \(2.2\), \(3.2\), \(5.2\), \(6.2\), and \(7\), as well as \(x\), \(y\), and \(z\) with \(x \leq y \leq z\). The range of the list is \(7\), and the mean and the median are both positive integers. How many ordered triples \((x, y, z)\) are possible?
q_zh: 一个包含9个实数的列表由1、2.2、3.2、5.2、6.2和7，以及满足\(x \leq y \leq z\)的\(x\)、\(y\)和\(z\)组成。列表的极差为7，均值和中位数都是正整数。有多少个有序三元组\((x, y, z)\)是可能的？

title: 第61题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: Jerry likes to play with numbers. One day, he wrote all the integers from \(1\) to \(2024\) on the whiteboard. Then he repeatedly chose four numbers on the whiteboard, erased them, and replaced them by either their sum or their product. (For example, Jerry's first step might have been to erase \(1\), \(2\), \(3\), and \(5\), and then write either \(11\), their sum, or \(30\), their product, on the whiteboard.) After repeatedly performing this operation, Jerry noticed that all the remaining numbers on the whiteboard were odd. What is the maximum possible number of integers on the whiteboard at that time?
q_zh: Jerry喜欢玩数字游戏。有一天，他在白板上写下了从1到2024的所有整数。然后他反复选择白板上的四个数，擦掉它们，并用它们的和或积来替换。（例如，Jerry的第一步可能是擦掉1、2、3和5，然后在白板上写上11（它们的和）或30（它们的积）。）在反复执行此操作后，Jerry注意到白板上所有剩余的数都是奇数。此时白板上整数的最多个数是多少？

title: 第62题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: The Fibonacci numbers are defined by \(F_1 = 1, F_2 = 1,\) and \(F_n = F_{n-1} + F_{n-2}\) for \(n \geq 3.\) What is
q_zh: 斐波那契数列由\(F_1 = 1\)、\(F_2 = 1\)以及\(n \geq 3\)时\(F_n = F_{n-1} + F_{n-2}\)定义。以下表达式的值是多少？

title: 第63题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en:
Let \(P(x)\) be the unique polynomial of minimal degree with the following properties:
\(P(x)\) has a leading coefficient \(1\),
\(1\) is a root of \(P(x)-1\),
\(2\) is a root of \(P(x-2)\),
\(3\) is a root of \(P(3x)\), and
\(4\) is a root of \(4P(x)\).
The roots of \(P(x)\) are integers, with one exception. The root that is not an integer can be written as \(\frac{m}{n}\), where \(m\) and \(n\) are relatively prime integers. What is \(m+n\)?
q_zh:
设\(P(x)\)是满足以下条件的最小次数唯一多项式：
\(P(x)\)的首项系数为\(1\)，
\(1\)是\(P(x)-1\)的根，
\(2\)是\(P(x-2)\)的根，
\(3\)是\(P(3x)\)的根，且
\(4\)是\(4P(x)\)的根。
\(P(x)\)的根都是整数，只有一个例外。不是整数的那个根可以写成\(\frac{m}{n}\)，其中\(m\)和\(n\)是互质的整数。求\(m+n\)？

title: 第64题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: How many ordered pairs of integers \((m,n)\) satisfy the equation \(m^2+mn+n^2 = m^2n^2\)?
q_zh: 有多少个有序整数对\((m, n)\)满足方程\(m^2 + mn + n^2 = m^2n^2\)?

title: 第65题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: An arithmetic sequence of positive integers has \(n\ge3\) terms, initial term \(a\), and common difference \(d\gt 1\). Carl wrote down all the terms in this sequence correctly except for one term, which was off by \(1\). The sum of the terms he wrote down was \(222\). What is \(a+d+n\)?
q_zh: 一个由正整数组成的等差数列有\(n \ge 3\)项，首项为\(a\)，公差为\(d \gt  1\)。Carl写下了这个数列中的所有项，但有一项写错了，误差为1。他写下的所有项之和为222。求\(a + d + n\)。

title: 第66题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: A four-term sequence is formed by adding each term of a four-term arithmetic sequence of positive integers to the corresponding term of a four-term geometric sequence of positive integers. The first three terms of the resulting four-term sequence are 57, 60, and 91. What is the fourth term of this sequence?
q_zh: 一个四项序列是这样形成的：将一个四项等差数列（正整数）的每一项与一个四项等比数列（正整数）的对应项相加。所得四项序列的前三项是57、60和91。求这个序列的第四项。

title: 第67题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Suppose that S is a subset of {1, 2, 3, …, 25} such that the sum of any two (not necessarily distinct) elements of S is never an element of S. What is the maximum number of elements S may contain?
q_zh: 假设S是{1, 2, 3, …, 25}的子集，使得S中任意两个（不一定不同）元素的和永远不是S的元素。S最多可以包含多少个元素？

title: 第68题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Let \(S_n\) be the sum of the first \(n\) terms of an arithmetic sequence that has a common difference of 2. The quotient \(\dfrac{S_{3n}}{S_n}\) does not depend on \(n\). What is \(S_{20}\)?
q_zh: 设\(S_n\)为一个等差数列前\(n\)项的和，该数列的公差为2。商\(\dfrac{S_{3n}}{S_n}\)不依赖于\(n\)。求\(S_{20}\)。

title: 第69题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: Consider systems of three linear equations with unknowns \(x\), \(y\), and \(z\), \begin{align*}a_1x+b_1y+c_1z&=0\\ a_2x+b_2y+c_2z&=0\\ a_3x+b_3y+c_3z&=0\end{align*} where each of the coefficients is either \(0\) or \(1\) and the system has a solution other than \(x=y=z=0\). For example, one such system is \[\{1x+1y+0z=0,\;0x+1y+1z=0,\;0x+0y+0z=0\}\] with a nonzero solution of \((x,y,z)=(1,-1,1)\). How many such systems of equations are there? (The equations in a system need not be distinct, and two systems containing the same equations in a different order are considered different.)
q_zh: 考虑含有未知数 \(x,y,z\) 的三个线性方程组，\begin{align*}a_1x+b_1y+c_1z&=0\\ a_2x+b_2y+c_2z&=0\\ a_3x+b_3y+c_3z&=0\end{align*} 其中每个系数为 \(0\) 或 \(1\)，且方程组有一个除 \(x=y=z=0\) 以外的解。例如，一个这样的方程组是 \[\{1x+1y+0z=0,\;0x+1y+1z=0,\;0x+0y+0z=0\}\]，它有一个非零解 \((x,y,z)=(1,-1,1)\)。这样的方程组有多少个？（方程组中的方程不必互不相同，包含相同方程但顺序不同的两个方程组被视为不同。）

title: 第70题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: Let \(P(x)\) be a polynomial with rational coefficients such that when \(P(x)\) is divided by the polynomial \(x^2+x+1\), the remainder is \(x+2\), and when \(P(x)\) is divided by the polynomial \(x^2+1\), the remainder is \(2x+1\). There is a unique polynomial of least degree with these two properties. What is the sum of the squares of the coefficients of that polynomial?
q_zh: 设 \(P(x)\) 是一个有有理系数的多项式，使得当 \(P(x)\) 除以多项式 \(x^2+x+1\) 时，余数为 \(x+2\)；当 \(P(x)\) 除以多项式 \(x^2+1\) 时，余数为 \(2x+1\)。满足这两个性质的次数最低的多项式是唯一的。求该多项式系数平方之和。

title: 第71题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Real numbers \(x\) and \(y\) satisfy \(x + y = 4\) and \(x \cdot y = -2\). What is the value of \[x + \frac{x^3}{y^2} + \frac{y^3}{x^2} + y?\]
q_zh: 实数\(x\)和\(y\)满足\(x + y = 4\)和\(x \cdot y = -2\)。求以下表达式的值：\[x + \frac{x^3}{y^2} + \frac{y^3}{x^2} + y.\]

title: 第72题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: What is the least possible value of \((x + 1)(x + 2)(x + 3)(x + 4) + 2019\) where \(x\) is a real number?

title: 第73题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: What is the sum of all real numbers \(x\) for which the median of the numbers 4, 6, 8, 17, and \(x\) is equal to the mean of those five numbers?
q_zh: 对于所有实数\(x\)，使得数4、6、8、17和\(x\)的中位数等于这五个数的平均值。求所有这样的实数\(x\)之和。

title: 第74题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: How many of the first \(2018\) numbers in the sequence \(101, 1001, 10001, 100001, \dots\) are divisible by \(101\)?

title: 第75题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: A function \(f\) is defined recursively by \(f(1)=f(2)=1\) and \[f(n)=f(n-1)-f(n-2)+n\] for all integers \(n \geq 3\). What is \(f(2018)\)?

title: 第76题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Define a sequence recursively by \(F_0 = 0\), \(F_1 = 1\), and \(F_n = \) the remainder when \(F_{n-1} + F_{n-2}\) is divided by \(3\), for all \(n \ge 2\). Thus the sequence starts \(0, 1, 1, 2, 0, 2, \ldots\). What is \(F_{2017} + F_{2018} + F_{2019} + F_{2020} + F_{2021} + F_{2022} + F_{2023} + F_{2024}\)?

title: 第77题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: How many ways are there to write 2016 as the sum of twos and threes, ignoring order? (For example, \(1008 \cdot 2 + 0 \cdot 3\) and \(402 \cdot 2 + 404 \cdot 3\) are two such ways.)
q_zh: 有多少种方法可以把2016写成2和3的和（不计顺序）？（例如，\(1008 \cdot 2 + 0 \cdot 3\)和\(402 \cdot 2 + 404 \cdot 3\)是两种这样的方法。）

title: 第78题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: For some particular value of \(N\), when \((a + b + c + d + 1)^N\) is expanded and like terms are combined, the resulting expression contains exactly 1001 terms that include all four variables \(a, b, c,\) and \(d\), each to some positive power. What is \(N\)?
q_zh: 对于某个特定的\(N\)值，当\((a + b + c + d + 1)^N\)展开并合并同类项后，所得表达式恰好包含1001个包含所有四个变量\(a, b, c,\)和\(d\)（每个都出现正整数次幂）的项。求\(N\)。

title: 第79题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: The sum of an infinite geometric series is a positive number \(S\), and the second term in the series is \(1\). What is the smallest possible value of \(S\)?
q_zh: 一个无穷等比级数的和是正数\(S\)，级数的第二项是1。\(S\)的最小可能值是多少？

title: 第80题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: What is the area of the region enclosed by the graph of the equation \(x^{2} + y^{2} = |x| + |y|\)?
q_zh: 方程\(x^{2} + y^{2} = |x| + |y|\)的图像所围成的区域的面积是多少？

title: 第81题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Let \(a\), \(b\), and \(c\) be three distinct one-digit numbers. What is the maximum value of the sum of the roots of the equation \((x - a)(x - b) + (x - b)(x - c) = 0\)?
q_zh: 设\(a\)、\(b\)和\(c\)是三个不同的一位数。方程\((x - a)(x - b) + (x - b)(x - c) = 0\)的根的和的最大值是多少？

title: 第82题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: Cozy the Cat and Dash the Dog are going up a staircase with a certain number of steps. However, instead of walking up the steps one at a time, both Cozy and Dash jump. Cozy goes two steps up with each jump (though if necessary, he will just jump the last step). Dash goes five steps up with each jump (though if necessary, he will just jump the last steps if there are fewer than 5 steps left). Suppose Dash takes 19 fewer jumps than Cozy to reach the top of the staircase. Let \(s\) denote the sum of all possible numbers of steps this staircase can have. What is the sum of the digits of \(s\)?
q_zh: 猫Cozy和狗Dash要上一段有若干级台阶的楼梯。然而，他们不是一次走一级台阶，而是跳跃。Cozy每次跳两级（如果需要，他会跳过最后一级）。Dash每次跳五级（如果剩余级数少于5级，他会跳完剩余的级数）。假设Dash比Cozy少用19次跳跃到达楼梯顶部。设\(s\)表示楼梯所有可能级数的和。\(s\)的数位之和是多少？

title: 第83题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Consider functions \(f\) that satisfy \(|f(x)-f(y)|\le \frac{1}{2}|x-y|\) for all real numbers \(x\) and \(y\). Of all such functions that also satisfy the equation \(f(300)=f(900)\), what is the greatest possible value of \(f(f(800))-f(f(400))\)?
q_zh: 考虑满足 \(|f(x)-f(y)|\le \frac{1}{2}|x-y|\)（对所有实数 \(x,y\)）的函数 \(f\)。在所有还满足 \(f(300)=f(900)\) 的这类函数中，\(f(f(800))-f(f(400))\) 的最大可能值是多少？

title: 第84题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: A quadratic polynomial with real coefficients and leading coefficient \(1\) is called disrespectful if the equation \(p(p(x))=0\) is satisfied by exactly three real numbers. Among all the disrespectful quadratic polynomials, there is a unique such polynomial \(\tilde{p}(x)\) for which the sum of the roots is maximized. What is \(\tilde{p}(1)\)?
q_zh: 一个首项系数为 \(1\) 的实系数二次多项式被称为 disrespectful，如果方程 \(p(p(x))=0\) 恰有三个实数解。在所有 disrespectful 的二次多项式中，存在唯一一个 \(\tilde{p}(x)\) 使其根之和最大。求 \(\tilde{p}(1)\)。

title: 第85题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Let \(f\) be a function defined on the set of positive rational numbers with the property that \(f(a \cdot b) = f(a) + f(b)\) for all positive rational numbers \(a\) and \(b\). Furthermore, suppose that \(f\) also has the property that \(f(p) = p\) for every prime number \(p\). For which of the following numbers \(x\) is \(f(x) < 0\)?
q_zh: 设\(f\)是定义在正有理数集上的函数，满足\(f(a \cdot b) = f(a) + f(b)\)（对于所有正有理数\(a\)和\(b\)）。进一步假设\(f\)还满足\(f(p) = p\)（对于每个质数\(p\)）。以下哪个数\(x\)使得\(f(x) < 0\)？

title: 第86题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Hiram's algebra notes are 50 pages long and are printed on 25 sheets of paper; the first sheet contains pages 1 and 2, the second sheet contains pages 3 and 4, and so on. One day he leaves his notes on the table before leaving for lunch, and his roommate decides to borrow some pages from the middle of the notes. When Hiram comes back, he discovers that his roommate has taken a consecutive set of sheets from the notes and that the average (mean) of the page numbers on all remaining sheets is exactly 19. How many sheets were borrowed?
q_zh: 希拉姆的代数笔记共50页，印在25张纸上；第一张纸包含第1页和第2页，第二张纸包含第3页和第4页，以此类推。有一天他外出吃午饭时把笔记放在桌上，他的室友决定从笔记中间借走一些页面。希拉姆回来时发现室友借走了连续的一组纸张，且所有剩余纸张的页码平均值恰好是19。问室友借走了多少张纸？

title: 第87题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Suppose that \(S\) is a finite set of positive integers. If the greatest integer in \(S\) is removed from \(S\), then the average value (arithmetic mean) of the integers remaining is 32. If the least integer in \(S\) is also removed, then the average value of the integers remaining is 35. If the greatest integer is then returned to the set, the average value of the integers rises to 40. The greatest integer in the original set \(S\) is 72 greater than the least integer in \(S\). What is the average value of all the integers in the set \(S\)?
q_zh: 假设\(S\)是一个正整数有限集合。如果将\(S\)中的最大整数从\(S\)中移除，则剩余整数的平均值（算术平均）为32。如果也将\(S\)中的最小整数移除，则剩余整数的平均值为35。如果再将最大整数放回集合中，则整数的平均值升至40。原始集合\(S\)中的最大整数比最小整数大72。求集合\(S\)中所有整数的平均值。

title: 第88题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Let \(p\), \(q\), and \(r\) be the distinct roots of the polynomial \(x^3 - 22x^2 + 80x - 67\). It is given that there exist real numbers \(A\), \(B\), and \(C\) such that \[\dfrac{1}{s^3 - 22s^2 + 80s - 67} = \dfrac{A}{s-p} + \dfrac{B}{s-q} + \dfrac{C}{s-r}\] for all \(s\notin\{p,q,r\}\). What is \(\tfrac{1}{A}+\tfrac{1}{B}+\tfrac{1}{C}\)?
q_zh: 设\(p\)、\(q\)和\(r\)是多项式\(x^3 - 22x^2 + 80x - 67\)的三个不同根。已知存在实数\(A\)、\(B\)和\(C\)，使得对于所有\(s\notin\{p,q,r\}\)，\[\dfrac{1}{s^3 - 22s^2 + 80s - 67} = \dfrac{A}{s-p} + \dfrac{B}{s-q} + \dfrac{C}{s-r}\]。求\(\tfrac{1}{A}+\tfrac{1}{B}+\tfrac{1}{C}\)。

title: 第89题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Let \(\lfloor x \rfloor\) denote the greatest integer less than or equal to \(x\). How many real numbers \(x\) satisfy the equation \(x^2 + 10,000\lfloor x \rfloor = 10,000x\)?
q_zh: 设\(\lfloor x \rfloor\)表示小于或等于\(x\)的最大整数。有多少个实数\(x\)满足方程\(x^2 + 10,000\lfloor x \rfloor = 10,000x\)？

title: 第90题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: For certain real numbers \(a, b,\) and \(c\), the polynomial \(g(x) = x^{3} + ax^{2} + x + 10\) has three distinct roots, and each root of \(g(x)\) is also a root of the polynomial \(f(x) = x^{4} + x^{3} + bx^{2} + 100x + c\). What is \(f(1)\)?
q_zh: 对于某些实数\(a, b,\)和\(c\)，多项式\(g(x) = x^{3} + ax^{2} + x + 10\)有三个不同的根，且\(g(x)\)的每个根也是多项式\(f(x) = x^{4} + x^{3} + bx^{2} + 100x + c\)的根。求\(f(1)\)。

title: 第91题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: How many four-digit integers \(abcd\), with \(a \neq 0\), have the property that the three two-digit integers \(ab \lt  bc \lt  cd\) form an increasing arithmetic sequence? One such number is \(4692\), where \(a = 4, b = 6, c = 9,\) and \(d = 2\).
q_zh: 有多少个四位数整数\(abcd\)（\(a \neq 0\)）满足三个两位数整数\(ab \lt  bc \lt  cd\)构成递增等差数列？其中一个这样的数是4692，其中\(a = 4, b = 6, c = 9,\)且\(d = 2\)。

title: 第92题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: The zeroes of the function \(f(x)=x^{2}-a x+2 a\) are integers. What is the sum of the possible values of \(a\)?
q_zh: 函数 \(f(x)=x^{2}-ax+2a\) 的两个零点均为整数。求所有满足条件的 \(a\) 值之和。

title: 第93题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: Andy and Betsy both live in Mathville. Andy leaves Mathville on his bicycle at \(1{:}30\), traveling due north at a steady \(8\) miles per hour. Betsy leaves on her bicycle from the same point at \(2{:}30\), traveling due east at a steady \(12\) miles per hour. At what time will they be exactly the same distance from their common starting point?
q_zh: Andy和Betsy都住在Mathville。Andy在\(1{:}30\)骑自行车离开Mathville，以每小时\(8\)英里的恒定速度向正北行驶。Betsy在\(2{:}30\)从同一地点骑自行车出发，以每小时\(12\)英里的恒定速度向正东行驶。他们什么时候会距离共同的出发点恰好相同距离？

title: 第94题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: How many isosceles triangles are there with positive area whose side lengths are all positive integers and whose longest side has length \(2025\)?
q_zh: 有多少个面积为正的等腰三角形，其边长都是正整数且最长边的长度为\(2025\)？

title: 第95题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: In an equilateral triangle each interior angle is trisected by a pair of rays. The intersection of the interiors of the middle \(20^\circ\)-angle at each vertex is the interior of a convex hexagon. What is the degree measure of the smallest angle of this hexagon?
q_zh: 在一个等边三角形中，每个内角被一对射线三等分。每个顶点处中间\(20^\circ\)角的内部的交集是一个凸六边形的内部。这个六边形最小角的度数是多少？

title: 第96题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: A semicircle has diameter \(\overline{AB}\) and chord \(\overline{CD}\) of length \(16\) parallel to \(\overline{AB}\). A smaller semicircle with diameter on \(\overline{AB}\) and tangent to \(\overline{CD}\) is cut from the larger semicircle, as shown below. What is the area of the resulting figure, shown shaded?
q_zh: 一个半圆的直径为\(\overline{AB}\)，有一条长度为\(16\)且平行于\(\overline{AB}\)的弦\(\overline{CD}\)。一个直径在\(\overline{AB}\)上且与\(\overline{CD}\)相切的较小半圆从大半圆中切去，如下图所示。所得图形（阴影部分）的面积是多少？

title: 第97题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Jerry wrote down the ones digit of each of the first \(2025\) positive squares: \(1, 4, 9, 6, 5, 6, \ldots\). What is the sum of all the numbers Jerry wrote down?
q_zh: Jerry写下了前\(2025\)个正整数平方的个位数字：\(1, 4, 9, 6, 5, 6, \ldots\)。Jerry写下的所有数字之和是多少？

title: 第98题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: A Pascal-like triangle has \(10\) as the top row and \(10\) followed by \(1\) as the second row. In each subsequent row the first number is \(10\), the last number is \(1\), and, as in the standard Pascal's Triangle, each other number in the row is the sum of the two numbers directly above it. The first four rows are shown below. What is the sum of the digits of the sum of the numbers in the \(11\)th row?
q_zh: 一个类Pascal三角形，第一行为\(10\)，第二行为\(10\)和\(1\)。之后每一行的第一个数是\(10\)，最后一个数是\(1\)，其余每个数等于其上方两个数之和（与标准Pascal三角形相同）。前四行如下图所示。第\(11\)行所有数之和的各位数字之和是多少？

title: 第99题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: The value of the two-digit number \(\overline{ab}\) in base seven equals the value of the two-digit number \(\overline{ba}\) in base nine. What is \(a + b\)?
q_zh: 七进制的两位数\(\overline{ab}\)的值等于九进制的两位数\(\overline{ba}\)的值。\(a + b\)是多少？

title: 第100题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: In \(\triangle ABC\), \(AB=10\), \(AC=18\), and \(\angle B=130^\circ.\) Let \(O\) be the center of the circle containing \(A\), \(B\), and \(C.\) What is the degree measure of \(\angle CAO\)?
q_zh: 在\(\triangle ABC\)中，\(AB = 10\)，\(AC = 18\)，\(\angle B = 130^\circ\)。设\(O\)为经过点\(A\)、\(B\)、\(C\)的圆的圆心。\(\angle CAO\)的度数是多少？

title: 第101题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: The line \(y = \frac{1}{3}x + 1\) divides the square region defined by \(0 \leq x \leq 2\) and \(0 \leq y \leq 2\) into an upper and lower region. The line \(x=a\) divides the lower region into two regions of equal area. Then \(a\) can be written as \(\sqrt{s} - t\), where \(s\) and \(t\) are positive integers. What is \(s+t\)?
q_zh: 直线\(y = \dfrac{1}{3}x + 1\)将由\(0 \le x \le 2\)和\(0 \le y \le 2\)定义的正方形区域分成上方区域和下方区域。直线\(x = a\)将下方区域分成两个面积相等的区域。\(a\)可以写成\(\sqrt{s} - t\)的形式，其中\(s\)和\(t\)是正整数。\(s + t\)是多少？

title: 第102题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Frances stands \(15\) meters directly south of a locked gate in a fence that runs east-west. Immediately behind the fence is a box of chocolates, located \(x\) meters east of the locked gate. An unlocked gate lies \(9\) meters east of the box, and another unlocked gate lies \(8\) meters west of the locked gate. Frances can reach the box by walking toward an unlocked gate, passing through it, and walking toward the box. It happens that the total distance Frances would travel is the same via either unlocked gate. What is the value of \(x\)?
q_zh: Frances站在一道东西走向栅栏上一扇上锁的门正南方\(15\)米处。栅栏后面紧挨着一盒巧克力，位于上锁的门以东\(x\)米处。巧克力盒以东\(9\)米处有一扇没锁的门，上锁的门以西\(8\)米处还有另一扇没锁的门。Frances可以走向一扇没锁的门，穿过它，然后走向巧克力盒。无论通过哪扇没锁的门，她走过的总路程都相同。\(x\)的值是多少？

title: 第103题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The figure below shows an equilateral triangle, a rhombus with a \(60^\circ\) angle, and a regular hexagon, each of them containing some mutually tangent congruent disks. Let \(T\), \(R\), and \(H\), respectively, denote the ratio in each case of the total area of the disks to the area of the enclosing polygon. Which of the following is true?
q_zh: 下图展示了等边三角形、有一个角是\(60^\circ\)的菱形和正六边形，每个图形都包含一些相互外切的全等圆盘。设\(T\)、\(R\)、\(H\)分别表示每种情况下圆盘总面积与外接多边形面积的比值。以下哪个选项是正确的？

title: 第104题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: A model used to estimate the time it will take to hike to the top of the mountain on a trail is of the form \(T=aL+bG,\) where \(a\) and \(b\) are constants, \(T\) is the time in minutes, \(L\) is the length of the trail in miles, and \(G\) is the altitude gain in feet. The model estimates that it will take \(69\) minutes to hike to the top if a trail is \(1.5\) miles long and ascends \(800\) feet, as well as if a trail is \(1.2\) miles long and ascends \(1100\) feet. How many minutes does the model estimate it will take to hike to the top if the trail is \(4.2\) miles long and ascends \(4000\) feet?
q_zh: 一个用于估计沿步道徒步到达山顶所需时间的模型公式为\(T = aL + bG\)，其中\(a\)和\(b\)是常数，\(T\)是时间（分钟），\(L\)是步道长度（英里），\(G\)是海拔增益（英尺）。该模型估计，如果步道长度为1.5英里且海拔增益为800英尺，则需要69分钟到达山顶；如果步道长度为1.2英里且海拔增益为1100英尺，也需要69分钟。如果步道长度为4.2英里且海拔增益为4000英尺，该模型估计需要多少分钟到达山顶？

title: 第105题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: In a long line of people arranged left to right, the 1013th person from the left is also the 1010th person from the right. How many people are in the line?
q_zh: 在从左到右排列的一长排人中，从左数第1013人也是从右数第1010人。这排有多少人？

title: 第106题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: A rectangle has integer side lengths and an area of \(2024\). What is the least possible perimeter of the rectangle?
q_zh: 一个矩形的边长均为整数，面积为2024。矩形的最小可能周长是多少？

title: 第107题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Quadrilateral \(ABCD\) is a parallelogram, and \(E\) is the midpoint of the side \(\overline{AD}\). Let \(F\) be the intersection of lines \(EB\) and \(AC\). What is the ratio of the area of quadrilateral \(CDEF\) to the area of \(\triangle CFB\)?
q_zh: 四边形\(ABCD\)是平行四边形，\(E\)是边\(\overline{AD}\)的中点。设\(F\)是直线\(EB\)和\(AC\)的交点。四边形\(CDEF\)的面积与\(\triangle CFB\)的面积之比是多少？

title: 第108题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: In the figure below \(WXYZ\) is a rectangle with \(WX=4\) and \(WZ=8\). Point \(M\) lies on \(\overline{XY}\), point \(A\) lies on \(\overline{YZ}\), and \(\angle WMA\) is a right angle. The areas of \(\triangle WXM\) and \(\triangle WAZ\) are equal. What is the area of \(\triangle WMA\)?
q_zh: 在下图中，\(WXYZ\)是一个矩形，\(WX = 4\)，\(WZ = 8\)。点\(M\)在线段\(\overline{XY}\)上，点\(A\)在线段\(\overline{YZ}\)上，\(\angle WMA\)是直角。\(\triangle WXM\)和\(\triangle WAZ\)的面积相等。\(\triangle WMA\)的面积是多少？

title: 第109题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: A quadrilateral has all integer side lengths, a perimeter of \(26\), and one side of length \(4\). What is the greatest possible length of one side of this quadrilateral?
q_zh: 一个四边形的所有边长均为整数，周长为\(26\)，其中一条边长为\(4\)。这个四边形的某条边最大可能长度是多少？

title: 第110题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: An integer is assigned to each vertex of a cube. The value of an edge is defined to be the sum of the values of the two vertices it touches, and the value of a face is defined to be the sum of the values of the four edges surrounding it. The value of the cube is defined as the sum of the values of its six faces. Suppose the sum of the integers assigned to the vertices is \(21\). What is the value of the cube?
q_zh: 立方体的每个顶点分配一个整数。一条边的值定义为它所连接的两个顶点的值之和，一个面的值定义为围绕它的四条边的值之和。立方体的值定义为它的六个面的值之和。假设分配给顶点的整数之和为\(21\)。立方体的值是多少？

title: 第111题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Janet rolls a standard \(6\)-sided die \(4\) times and keeps a running total of the numbers she rolls. What is the probability that at some point, her running total will equal \(3?\)
q_zh: Janet掷一枚标准六面骰子4次，并记录她掷出数字的累计总和。在某个时刻，她的累计总和等于\(3\)的概率是多少？

title: 第112题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: A square of area \(2\) is inscribed in a square of area \(3\), creating four congruent triangles, as shown below. What is the ratio of the shorter leg to the longer leg in the shaded right triangle?
q_zh: 一个面积为\(2\)的正方形内接于一个面积为\(3\)的正方形中，形成四个全等三角形，如下图所示。在阴影直角三角形中，较短直角边与较长直角边的比是多少？

title: 第113题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: A \(3-4-5\) right triangle is inscribed in circle \(A\), and a \(5-12-13\) right triangle is inscribed in circle \(B\). What is the ratio of the area of circle \(A\) to the area of circle \(B\)?
q_zh: 一个\(3\)-\(4\)-\(5\)直角三角形内接于圆\(A\)，一个\(5\)-\(12\)-\(13\)直角三角形内接于圆\(B\)。圆\(A\)的面积与圆\(B\)的面积之比是多少？

title: 第114题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: Jackson's paintbrush makes a narrow strip with a width of \(6.5\) millimeters. Jackson has enough paint to make a strip \(25\) meters long. How many square centimeters of paper could Jackson cover with paint?
q_zh: Jackson的画笔画出宽度为6.5毫米的窄条。Jackson有足够的颜料画一条25米长的条带。Jackson可以用颜料覆盖多少平方厘米的纸？

title: 第115题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Square \(ABCD\) is rotated \(20^{\circ}\) clockwise about its center to obtain square \(EFGH\), as shown below. What is the degree measure of \(\angle{EAB}\)?
q_zh: 正方形\(ABCD\)绕其中心顺时针旋转\(20^{\circ}\)得到正方形\(EFGH\)，如下图所示。\(\angle EAB\)的度数是多少？

title: 第116题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The numbers \(16\) and \(25\) are a pair of consecutive positive squares whose difference is \(9\). How many pairs of consecutive positive perfect squares have a difference of less than or equal to \(2023\)?
q_zh: 16和25是一对连续的正完全平方数，它们的差为9。有多少对连续的正完全平方数的差小于或等于2023？

title: 第117题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: Square \(ABCD\) has side length \(1\). Points \(P\), \(Q\), \(R\), and \(S\) each lie on a side of \(ABCD\) such that \(APQCRS\) is an equilateral convex hexagon with side length \(s\). What is \(s\)?
q_zh: 正方形 \(ABCD\) 的边长为 \(1\)。点 \(P\)、\(Q\)、\(R\)、\(S\) 分别位于 \(ABCD\) 的各边上，使得 \(APQCRS\) 是边长为 \(s\) 的等边凸六边形。求 \(s\)。

title: 第118题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: A rectangle is partitioned into 5 regions as shown. Each region is to be painted a solid color - red, orange, yellow, blue, or green - so that regions that touch are painted different colors, and colors can be used more than once. How many different colorings are possible?
q_zh: 一个矩形如图所示被分割成5个区域。每个区域将被涂上纯色——红、橙、黄、蓝或绿——使得相邻的区域被涂上不同的颜色，颜色可以重复使用。有多少种不同的涂色方式？

title: 第119题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Daniel finds a rectangular index card and measures its diagonal to be \(8\) centimeters. Daniel then cuts out equal squares of side \(1\) cm at two opposite corners of the index card and measures the distance between the two closest vertices of these squares to be \(4\sqrt{2}\) centimeters, as shown below. What is the area of the original index card?
q_zh: 丹尼尔找到一张矩形索引卡，测得其对角线为 \(8\) 厘米。然后他在索引卡的两个对角切下边长为 \(1\) 厘米的相同正方形，并测得这两个正方形最近顶点之间的距离为 \(4\sqrt{2}\) 厘米（如下图所示）。求原来索引卡的面积。

title: 第120题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: In rhombus ABCD, point P lies on segment AD so that BP ⊥ AD, AP = 3, and PD = 2. What is the area of ABCD? (Note: The figure is not drawn to scale.)
q_zh: 在菱形ABCD中，点P在边AD上使得BP ⊥ AD，AP = 3，PD = 2。ABCD的面积是多少？（注：图未按比例绘制。）

title: 第121题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Consider the following 100 sets of 10 elements each: {1, 2, 3, …, 10}, {11, 12, 13, …, 20}, {21, 22, 23, …, 30}, …, {991, 992, 993, …, 1000}. How many of these sets contain exactly two multiples of 7?

title: 第122题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: Menkara has a \(4 \times 6\) index card. If she shortens the length of one side of this card by \(1\) inch, the card would have area \(18\) square inches. What would the area of the card be in square inches if instead she shortens the length of the other side by \(1\) inch?
q_zh: Menkara 有一张 \(4\times 6\) 的索引卡。如果她将该卡片一条边的长度缩短 \(1\) 英寸，则卡片面积变为 \(18\) 平方英寸。如果她改为缩短另一条边的长度 \(1\) 英寸，卡片面积将是多少平方英寸？

title: 第123题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: What is the maximum number of balls of clay of radius \(2\) that can completely fit inside a cube of side length \(6\) assuming the balls can be reshaped but not compressed before they are packed in the cube?
q_zh: 半径为 \(2\) 的泥球最多有多少个可以完全放入一个边长为 \(6\) 的立方体中？假设泥球可以被重塑但在放入立方体前不能被压缩。

title: 第124题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Elmer the emu takes \(44\) equal strides to walk between consecutive telephone poles on a rural road. Oscar the ostrich can cover the same distance in \(12\) equal leaps. The telephone poles are evenly spaced, and the \(41\)st pole along this road is exactly one mile (\(5280\) feet) from the first pole. How much longer, in feet, is Oscar's leap than Elmer's stride?
q_zh: 鸸鹋 Elmer 在乡间小路上相邻两根电话杆之间走 \(44\) 步。鸵鸟 Oscar 用 \(12\) 步即可跨过同样距离。电话杆均匀排列，第 \(41\) 根杆与第一根杆相距正好一英里（\(5280\) 英尺）。Oscar 的步长比 Elmer 的步长长多少英尺？

title: 第125题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: As shown in the figure below, point \(E\) lies on the opposite half-plane determined by line \(CD\) from point \(A\) so that \(\angle CDE = 110^\circ\). Point \(F\) lies on \(\overline{AD}\) so that \(DE=DF\), and \(ABCD\) is a square. What is the degree measure of \(\angle AFE\)?
q_zh: 如图所示，点 \(E\) 位于由直线 \(CD\) 确定的与点 \(A\) 相对的半平面内，且 \(\angle CDE=110^\circ\)。点 \(F\) 在 \(\overline{AD}\) 上且 \(DE=DF\)，\(ABCD\) 是正方形。求 \(\angle AFE\) 的度数。

title: 第126题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Emily sees a ship traveling at a constant speed along a straight section of a river. She walks parallel to the riverbank at a uniform rate faster than the ship. She counts \(210\) equal steps walking from the back of the ship to the front. Walking in the opposite direction, she counts \(42\) steps of the same size from the front of the ship to the back. In terms of Emily's equal steps, what is the length of the ship?
q_zh: Emily 看到一艘船以恒定速度沿一段笔直的河道行驶。她平行于河岸行走，速度均匀且比船快。她从船尾走到船头共数了 \(210\) 步。反方向走时，她从船头走到船尾共数了 \(42\) 步。以 Emily 的步长为单位，船的长度是多少？

title: 第127题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Isosceles triangle \(ABC\) has \(AB = AC = 3\sqrt6\), and a circle with radius \(5\sqrt2\) is tangent to line \(AB\) at \(B\) and to line \(AC\) at \(C\). What is the area of the circle that passes through vertices \(A\), \(B\), and \(C\)?
q_zh: 等腰三角形 \(ABC\) 满足 \(AB=AC=3\sqrt6\)，且一个半径为 \(5\sqrt2\) 的圆与直线 \(AB\) 切于 \(B\)，与直线 \(AC\) 切于 \(C\)。求经过顶点 \(A,B,C\) 的圆的面积。

title: 第128题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: An architect is building a structure that will place vertical pillars at the vertices of regular hexagon \(ABCDEF\), which is lying horizontally on the ground. The six pillars will hold up a flat solar panel that will not be parallel to the ground. The heights of pillars at \(A\), \(B\), and \(C\) are \(12\), \(9\), and \(10\) meters, respectively. What is the height, in meters, of the pillar at \(E\)?
q_zh: 一位建筑师建造一个结构，在地面上正六边形 \(ABCDEF\) 的顶点处竖立六根垂直支柱。六根支柱撑起一块不平行于地面的平面太阳能板。\(A,B,C\) 三处的支柱高度分别为 \(12,9,10\) 米。求 \(E\) 处支柱的高度。

title: 第129题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: What is the area of the shaded figure shown below?
q_zh: 下图阴影部分的面积是多少？

title: 第130题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: A regular hexagon of side length \(1{ }\) is inscribed in a circle. Each minor arc of the circle determined by a side of the hexagon is reflected over that side. What is the area of the region bounded by these \(6\) reflected arcs?
q_zh: 一个边长为 \(1\) 的正六边形内接于圆。将每条边所对的劣弧关于该边反射。求这 \(6\) 条反射弧所围成区域的面积。

title: 第131题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: A square with side length \(3\) is inscribed in an isosceles triangle with one side of the square along the base of the triangle. A square with side length \(2\) has two vertices on the other square and the other two on sides of the triangle, as shown. What is the area of the triangle?
q_zh: 一个边长为 \(3\) 的正方形内接于一个等腰三角形，且该正方形的一边在三角形的底边上。另一个边长为 \(2\) 的正方形有两个顶点在第一个正方形上，另两个顶点在三角形的边上，如图所示。求该三角形的面积。

title: 第132题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: In square \(ABCD\), points \(P\) and \(Q\) lie on \(\overline{AD}\) and \(\overline{AB}\), respectively. Segments \(\overline{BP}\) and \(\overline{CQ}\) intersect at right angles at \(R\), with \(BR=6\) and \(PR=7\). What is the area of the square?
q_zh: 在正方形 \(ABCD\) 中，点 \(P\) 和 \(Q\) 分别位于 \(\overline{AD}\) 和 \(\overline{AB}\) 上。线段 \(\overline{BP}\) 与 \(\overline{CQ}\) 垂直相交于 \(R\)，且 \(BR=6\)、\(PR=7\)。求正方形的面积。

title: 第133题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Distinct lines \(\ell\) and \(m\) lie in the \(xy\)-plane. They intersect at the origin. Point \(P(-1, 4)\) is reflected about line \(\ell\) to point \(P'\), and then \(P'\) is reflected about line \(m\) to point \(P''\). The equation of line \(\ell\) is \(5x - y = 0\), and the coordinates of \(P''\) are \((4,1)\). What is the equation of line \(m?\)
q_zh: 两条不同直线 \(\ell\) 和 \(m\) 位于 \(xy\) 平面内，且交于原点。点 \(P(-1,4)\) 关于直线 \(\ell\) 反射得到 \(P'\)，再将 \(P'\) 关于直线 \(m\) 反射得到 \(P''\)。已知直线 \(\ell\) 的方程为 \(5x-y=0\)，且 \(P''\) 的坐标为 \((4,1)\)。求直线 \(m\) 的方程。

title: 第134题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Three identical square sheets of paper each with side length \(6{ }\) are stacked on top of each other. The middle sheet is rotated clockwise \(30^\circ\) about its center and the top sheet is rotated clockwise \(60^\circ\) about its center, resulting in the \(24\)-sided polygon shown in the figure below. The area of this polygon can be expressed in the form \(a-b\sqrt{c}\), where \(a\), \(b\), and \(c\) are positive integers, and \(c\) is not divisible by the square of any prime. What is \(a+b+c?\)
q_zh: 三张边长均为 \(6\) 的相同正方形纸片叠放在一起。中间那张绕其中心顺时针旋转 \(30^\circ\)，最上面那张绕其中心顺时针旋转 \(60^\circ\)，形成下图所示的 \(24\) 边形。该多边形的面积可表示为 \(a-b\sqrt c\) 的形式，其中 \(a,b,c\) 为正整数，且 \(c\) 不被任何质数的平方整除。求 \(a+b+c\)。

title: 第135题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: When a student multiplied the number 66 by the repeating decimal \(1.\overline{ab}\), where \(a\) and \(b\) are digits, he did not notice the notation and just multiplied 66 times \(1.ab\). Later he found that his answer is 0.5 less than the correct answer. What is the 2-digit number \(\overline{ab}\)?
q_zh: 当一名学生将66乘以循环小数\(1.\overline{ab}\)（其中\(a\)和\(b\)是数字）时，他没有注意到循环小数的标记，直接将66乘以\(1.ab\)。后来他发现自己的答案比正确答案少了0.5。两位数\(\overline{ab}\)是多少？

title: 第136题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Two right circular cones with vertices facing down as shown in the figure below contain the same amount of liquid. The radii of the tops of the liquid surfaces are \(3\text{ cm}\) and \(6\text{ cm}\). Into each cone is dropped a spherical marble of radius \(1\text{ cm}\), which sinks to the bottom and is completely submerged without spilling any liquid. What is the ratio of the rise of the liquid level in the narrow cone to the rise of the liquid level in the wide cone?
q_zh: 两个顶点朝下的直立圆锥如下图所示，含有相同体积的液体。液体表面顶部的半径分别为\(3\text{ cm}\)和\(6\text{ cm}\)。向每个圆锥中投入一个半径为\(1\text{ cm}\)的球形弹珠，弹珠沉到底部并完全浸没，且没有液体溢出。窄圆锥中液面上升高度与宽圆锥中液面上升高度之比是多少？

title: 第137题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: What is the volume of tetrahedron \(ABCD\) with edge lengths \(AB = 2\), \(AC = 3\), \(AD = 4\), \(BC = \sqrt{13}\), \(BD = 2\sqrt{5}\), and \(CD = 5\)?
q_zh: 已知四面体\(ABCD\)的棱长为\(AB = 2\), \(AC = 3\), \(AD = 4\), \(BC = \sqrt{13}\), \(BD = 2\sqrt{5}\), \(CD = 5\)，其体积是多少？

title: 第138题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: In a plane, four circles with radii 1, 3, 5, and 7 are tangent to line \(\ell\) at the same point \(A\), but they may be on either side of \(\ell\). Region \(S\) consists of all the points that lie inside exactly one of the four circles. What is the maximum possible area of region \(S\)?
q_zh: 在平面上，四个半径分别为1、3、5和7的圆都与直线\(\ell\)相切于同一点\(A\)，但它们可能在直线\(\ell\)的任意一侧。区域\(S\)由恰好位于四个圆中其中一个圆内部的所有点组成。区域\(S\)的最大可能面积是多少？

title: 第139题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The point \(P(a,b)\) in the \(xy\)-plane is first rotated counterclockwise by \(90^{\circ}\) around the point \((1,5)\) and then reflected about the line \(y = -x\). The image of \(P\) after these two transformations is at \((-6,3)\). What is \(b - a\)?
q_zh: 平面上的点\(P(a,b)\)先绕点\((1,5)\)逆时针旋转\(90^{\circ}\)，然后关于直线\(y = -x\)反射。这两次变换后\(P\)的像为\((-6,3)\)。求\(b - a\)。

title: 第140题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: An inverted cone with base radius \(12\text{ cm}\) and height \(18\text{ cm}\) is full of water. The water is poured into a tall cylinder whose horizontal base has a radius of \(24\text{ cm}\). What is the height in centimeters of the water in the cylinder?
q_zh: 一个倒置的圆锥（底面半径\(12\text{ cm}\)，高\(18\text{ cm}\)）装满了水。将水倒入一个竖直圆筒中，圆筒的水平底面半径为\(24\text{ cm}\)。问圆筒中水的高度是多少厘米？

title: 第141题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Grandma has just finished baking a large rectangular pan of brownies. She is planning to make rectangular pieces of equal size and shape, with straight cuts parallel to the sides of the pan. Each cut must be made entirely across the pan. Grandma wants to make the same number of interior pieces as pieces along the perimeter of the pan. What is the greatest possible number of brownies she can produce?
q_zh: 奶奶刚烤好一大盘矩形布朗尼。她计划将布朗尼切成大小和形状相同的矩形小块，切割平行于烤盘边缘。每次切割必须横跨整个烤盘。奶奶希望内部小块的数量与沿烤盘边缘的小块数量相同。她最多能切出多少块布朗尼？

title: 第142题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Three equally spaced parallel lines intersect a circle, creating three chords of lengths 38, 38, and 34. What is the distance between two adjacent parallel lines?
q_zh: 三条等距平行线与一个圆相交，形成三条弦，长度分别为38、38和34。问两条相邻平行线之间的距离是多少？

title: 第143题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: A driver travels for 2 hours at 60 miles per hour, during which her car gets 30 miles per gallon of gasoline. She is paid $0.50 per mile, and her only expense is gasoline at $2.00 per gallon. What is her net rate of pay, in dollars per hour, after this expense?
q_zh: 一位司机以60英里/小时的速度行驶2小时，期间她的车每加仑汽油能行驶30英里。她每英里获得0.50美元报酬，唯一的支出是每加仑2.00美元的汽油。扣除这项支出后，她每小时净挣多少美元？

title: 第144题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: The 25 integers from -10 to 14 inclusive, can be arranged to form a 5-by-5 square in which the sum of the numbers in each row, the sum of the numbers in each column, and the sum of the numbers along each of the main diagonals are all the same. What is the value of this common sum?
q_zh: 从-10到14（含端点）的25个整数可以排列成一个5×5的方阵，其中每行数字之和、每列数字之和以及每条主对角线数字之和都相同。这个共同和是多少？

title: 第145题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Seven cubes, whose volumes are 1, 8, 27, 64, 125, 216, and 343 cubic units, are stacked vertically to form a tower in which the volumes of the cubes decrease from bottom to top. Except for the bottom cube, the bottom face of each cube lies completely on top of the cube below it. What is the total surface area of the tower (including the bottom) in square units?
q_zh: 七个立方体，体积分别为1、8、27、64、125、216和343立方单位，垂直堆叠形成一座塔，立方体的体积从底到顶递减。除底部立方体外，每个立方体的底面完全放在下方立方体的上面。这座塔的总表面积（包括底部）是多少平方单位？

title: 第146题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Triangle \(AMC\) is isosceles with \(AM = AC\). Medians \(MV\) and \(CU\) are perpendicular to each other, and \(MV = CU = 12\). What is the area of \(\triangle AMC\)?
q_zh: 三角形\(AMC\)是等腰三角形，其中\(AM = AC\)。中线\(MV\)和\(CU\)互相垂直，且\(MV = CU = 12\)。求三角形\(AMC\)的面积。

title: 第147题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Carl has 5 cubes each having side length 1, and Kate has 5 cubes each having side length 2. What is the total volume of these 10 cubes?
q_zh: Carl有5个边长为1的立方体，Kate有5个边长为2的立方体。这10个立方体的总体积是多少？

title: 第148题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: The acute angles of a right triangle are \(a^\circ\) and \(b^\circ\), where \(a \gt  b\) and both \(a\) and \(b\) are prime numbers. What is the least possible value of \(b\)?
q_zh: 一个直角三角形的两个锐角是\(a^\circ\)和\(b^\circ\)，其中\(a \gt  b\)，且\(a\)和\(b\)都是质数。\(b\)的最小可能值是多少？

title: 第149题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Points \(P\) and \(Q\) lie in a plane with \(PQ = 8\). How many locations for point \(R\) in this plane are there such that the triangle with vertices \(P\), \(Q\), and \(R\) is a right triangle with area 12 square units?
q_zh: 点\(P\)和\(Q\)在平面上，\(PQ = 8\)。在这个平面上有多少个点\(R\)的位置，使得顶点为\(P\)、\(Q\)和\(R\)的三角形是面积为12平方单位的直角三角形？

title: 第150题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: A three-quarter sector of a circle of radius 4 inches together with its interior can be rolled up to form the lateral surface area of a right circular cone by taping together along the two radii shown. What is the volume of the cone in cubic inches?
q_zh: 一个半径为4英寸的圆的四分之三扇形及其内部可以通过沿所示的两条半径粘合在一起，卷成一个直圆锥的侧面。这个圆锥的体积是多少立方英寸？

title: 第151题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The decimal representation of \[\dfrac{1}{20^{20}}\] consists of a string of zeros after the decimal point, followed by a 9 and then several more digits. How many zeros are in that initial string of zeros after the decimal point?
q_zh: \(\dfrac{1}{20^{20}}\)的小数表示由小数点后的一串零组成，随后是一个9，然后是几个更多的数字。小数点后这串初始零中有多少个零？

title: 第152题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Ana and Bonita are born on the same date in different years, \(n\) years apart. Last year Ana was \(5\) times as old as Bonita. This year Ana's age is the square of Bonita's age. What is \(n\)?
q_zh: Ana和Bonita在不同年份的同一天出生，相差\(n\)岁。去年Ana的年龄是Bonita年龄的\(5\)倍。今年Ana的年龄是Bonita年龄的平方。求\(n\)。

title: 第153题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: For how many of the following types of quadrilaterals does there exist a point in the plane of the quadrilateral that is equidistant from all four vertices of the quadrilateral? • a square • a rectangle that is not a square • a rhombus that is not a square • a parallelogram that is not a rectangle or a rhombus • an isosceles trapezoid that is not a parallelogram
q_zh: 以下有多少种类型的四边形，在其所在的平面中存在一个与所有四个顶点距离相等的点？• 正方形 • 非正方形的矩形 • 非正方形的菱形 • 既非矩形也非菱形的平行四边形 • 非平行四边形的等腰梯形。

title: 第154题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Two lines with slopes \(\dfrac{1}{2}\) and \(2\) intersect at \((2,2)\). What is the area of the triangle enclosed by these two lines and the line \(x + y = 10\)?
q_zh: 斜率为\(\dfrac{1}{2}\)和\(2\)的两条直线在\((2,2)\)处相交。这两条直线与直线\(x + y = 10\)所围成的三角形面积是多少？

title: 第155题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: The figure below shows line \(\ell\) with a regular, infinite, recurring pattern of squares and line segments. How many of the following four kinds of rigid motion transformations of the plane in which this figure is drawn, other than the identity transformation, will transform this figure into itself? • some rotation around a point of line \(\ell\) • some translation in the direction parallel to line \(\ell\) • the reflection across line \(\ell\) • some reflection across a line perpendicular to line \(\ell\)
q_zh: 下图显示了一条带有规则的、无限循环的正方形和线段图案的直线\(\ell\)。以下四种类型的刚体运动变换（非恒等变换）中，有多少种能将这个图形变换到自身？• 绕直线\(\ell\)上某点的旋转 • 沿平行于直线\(\ell\)方向的平移 • 关于直线\(\ell\)的反射 • 关于某条垂直于直线\(\ell\)的直线的反射。

title: 第156题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: A rectangular floor that is 10 feet wide and 17 feet long is tiled with 170 one-foot square tiles. A bug walks from one corner to the opposite corner in a straight line. Including the first and the last tile, how many tiles does the bug visit?
q_zh: 一个宽10英尺、长17英尺的矩形地板用170个一平方英尺的瓷砖铺满。一只虫子从一角沿直线爬到对角。包括第一块和最后一块瓷砖，虫子经过了多少块瓷砖？

title: 第157题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: Alicia had two containers. The first was \(\dfrac{5}{6}\) full of water and the second was empty. She poured all the water from the first container into the second container, at which point the second container was \(\dfrac{3}{4}\) full of water. What is the ratio of the volume of the first container to the volume of the second container?
q_zh: Alicia有两个容器。第一个容器装满了\(\dfrac{5}{6}\)的水，第二个容器是空的。她把第一个容器里的所有水倒进第二个容器，此时第二个容器装了\(\dfrac{3}{4}\)的水。第一个容器的体积与第二个容器的体积之比是多少？

title: 第158题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Consider the statement, "If \(n\) is not prime, then \(n - 2\) is prime." Which of the following values of \(n\) is a counterexample to this statement?
q_zh: 考虑这个命题："如果\(n\)不是质数，那么\(n - 2\)是质数。"以下哪个\(n\)的值是这个命题的反例？

title: 第159题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: All lines with equation \(ax + by = c\) such that \(a, b, c\) form an arithmetic progression pass through a common point. What are the coordinates of that point?
q_zh: 所有形如\(ax + by = c\)的直线，其中\(a, b, c\)构成等差数列，这些直线都经过一个公共点。这个点的坐标是什么？

title: 第160题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: Triangle \(ABC\) lies in the first quadrant. Points \(A\), \(B\), and \(C\) are reflected across the line \(y = x\) to points \(A'\), \(B'\), and \(C'\) respectively. Assume that none of the vertices of the triangle lie on the line \(y = x\). Which of the following statements is not always true?
q_zh: 三角形\(ABC\)位于第一象限。点\(A\)、\(B\)和\(C\)关于直线\(y = x\)分别反射到点\(A'\)、\(B'\)和\(C'\)。假设三角形的任何顶点都不在直线\(y = x\)上。以下哪个陈述并非总是成立？
options: A. Triangle \(A'B'C'\) lies in the first quadrant.
B. Triangles \(ABC\) and \(A'B'C'\) have the same area.
C. The slope of line \(AA'\) is \(-1\).
D. The slopes of lines \(AA'\) and \(CC'\) are the same.
E. Lines \(AB\) and \(A'B'\) are perpendicular to each other.

title: 第161题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: The figure below shows a square and four equilateral triangles, with each triangle having a side lying on a side of the square, such that each triangle has side length 2 and the third vertices of the triangles meet at the center of the square. The region inside the square but outside the triangles is shaded. What is the area of the shaded region?
q_zh: 下图显示了一个正方形和四个等边三角形，每个三角形的一条边位于正方形的一条边上，每个三角形的边长为2，且四个三角形的第三个顶点汇聚于正方形的中心。正方形内部但不在三角形内的区域被涂色。求涂色区域的面积。

title: 第162题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: In a given plane, points \(A\) and \(B\) are 10 units apart. How many points \(C\) are there in the plane such that the perimeter of \(\triangle ABC\) is 50 units and the area of \(\triangle ABC\) is 100 square units?
q_zh: 在给定平面上，点\(A\)和\(B\)相距10个单位。有多少个点\(C\)位于该平面上，使得三角形\(ABC\)的周长为50个单位，且面积为100平方单位？

title: 第163题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Liliane has 50% more soda than Jacqueline, and Alice has 25% more soda than Jacqueline. What is the relationship between the amounts of soda that Liliane and Alice have?
q_zh: Liliane的汽水比Jacqueline多50%，Alice的汽水比Jacqueline多25%。Liliane和Alice的汽水量之间是什么关系？
options: A. Liliane has 20% more soda than Alice.
B. Liliane has 25% more soda than Alice.
C. Liliane has 45% more soda than Alice.
D. Liliane has 75% more soda than Alice.
E. Liliane has 100% more soda than Alice.

title: 第164题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Sangho uploaded a video to a website where viewers can vote that they like or dislike a video. Each video begins with a score of 0 and the score increases by 1 for each like vote and decreases by 1 for each dislike vote. At one point Sangho saw that his video had a score of 90, and that 65% of the votes cast on his video were like votes. How many votes had been cast on Sangho's video at that point?
q_zh: Sangho在一个网站上上传了一个视频，观众可以投票表示喜欢或不喜欢。每个视频初始分数为0，每收到一个赞分数加1，每收到一个踩分数减1。有一刻Sangho看到他的视频分数是90，而且65%的投票是赞。那个时候Sangho的视频收到了多少投票？

title: 第165题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: All of the triangles in the diagram below are similar to isosceles triangle \(ABC\), in which \(AB = AC\). Each of the 7 smallest triangles has area 1, and \(\triangle ABC\) has area 40. What is the area of trapezoid \(DBCE\)?
q_zh: 下图中的所有三角形都与等腰三角形\(ABC\)相似，其中\(AB = AC\)。7个最小的三角形每个面积都是1，\(\triangle ABC\)的面积是40。梯形\(DBCE\)的面积是多少？

title: 第166题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: Kate bakes a 20-inch by 18-inch pan of cornbread. The cornbread is cut into pieces that measure 2 inches by 2 inches. How many pieces of cornbread does the pan contain?
q_zh: Kate烤了一盘20英寸乘18英寸的玉米面包。玉米面包被切成2英寸乘2英寸的小块。这个烤盘里有多少块玉米面包？

title: 第167题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: In the expression \(\left(\underline{\qquad}\times\underline{\qquad}\right)+\left(\underline{\qquad}\times\underline{\qquad}\right)\) each blank is to be filled in with one of the digits \(1, 2, 3,\) or \(4,\) with each digit being used once. How many different values can be obtained?
q_zh: 在表达式\(\left(\underline{\qquad}\times\underline{\qquad}\right)+\left(\underline{\qquad}\times\underline{\qquad}\right)\)中，每个空格要填入数字1、2、3或4中的一个，且每个数字只能使用一次。可以得到多少个不同的值？

title: 第168题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: A three-dimensional rectangular box with dimensions \(X\), \(Y\), and \(Z\) has faces whose surface areas are \(24, 24, 48, 48, 72,\) and \(72\) square units. What is \(X+Y+Z\)?
q_zh: 一个三维长方体盒子，尺寸为\(X\)、\(Y\)和\(Z\)，其各面的面积分别为24、24、48、48、72和72平方单位。\(X+Y+Z\)是多少？

title: 第169题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: In the figure below, \(N\) congruent semicircles are drawn along a diameter of a large semicircle, with their diameters covering the diameter of the large semicircle with no overlap. Let \(A\) be the combined area of the small semicircles and \(B\) be the area of the region inside the large semicircle but outside the small semicircles. The ratio \(A:B\) is \(1:18\). What is \(N\)?
q_zh: 在下图中，沿着一个大半圆的直径画了\(N\)个全等的半圆，它们的直径覆盖了大半圆的直径且不重叠。设\(A\)为小半圆的合并面积，\(B\)为大半圆内部但小半圆外部的区域面积。比\(A:B\)为\(1:18\)。\(N\)是多少？

title: 第170题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: In the rectangular parallelepiped shown, \(AB=3\), \(BC=1\), and \(CG=2\). Point \(M\) is the midpoint of \(\overline{FG}\). What is the volume of the rectangular pyramid with base \(BCHE\) and apex \(M\)?
q_zh: 在如图所示的长方体中，\(AB=3\)，\(BC=1\)，\(CG=2\)。点\(M\)是\(\overline{FG}\)的中点。求以\(BCHE\)为底、\(M\)为顶点的矩形棱锥的体积。

title: 第171题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Line segment \(\overline{AB}\) is a diameter of a circle with \(AB=24\). Point \(C\), not equal to \(A\) or \(B\), lies on the circle. As point \(C\) moves around the circle, the centroid (center of mass) of \(\triangle{ABC}\) traces out a closed curve missing two points. To the nearest positive integer, what is the area of the region bounded by this curve?
q_zh: 线段\(\overline{AB}\)是圆的直径，且\(AB=24\)。点\(C\)（不等于\(A\)或\(B\)）在圆上。当点\(C\)沿圆周移动时，三角形\(ABC\)的重心会描出一条缺少两个点的闭合曲线。该曲线所围成区域的面积四舍五入到最接近的正整数是多少？

title: 第172题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Tamara has three rows of two \(6\)-feet by \(2\)-feet flower beds in her garden. The beds are separated and also surrounded by \(1\)-foot-wide walkways, as shown on the diagram. What is the total area of the walkways, in square feet?
q_zh: Tamara在花园里有三排两列的\(6\)英尺乘\(2\)英尺的花坛。如图所示，花坛之间以及周围有\(1\)英尺宽的人行道。人行道的总面积是多少平方英尺？

title: 第173题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Jerry and Silvia wanted to go from the southwest corner of a square field to the northeast corner. Jerry walked due east and then due north to reach the goal, but Silvia headed northeast and reached the goal walking in a straight line. Which of the following is closest to how much shorter Silvia's trip was, compared to Jerry's trip?
q_zh: Jerry和Silvia想从一个正方形田地的西南角走到东北角。Jerry向东走再向北走到达目标，但Silvia向东北方向走直线到达目标。与Jerry的行程相比，Silvia的行程短了大约多少？

title: 第174题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Minnie rides on a flat road at \(20\) kilometers per hour (kph), downhill at \(30\) kph, and uphill at \(5\) kph. Penny rides on a flat road at \(30\) kph, downhill at \(40\) kph, and uphill at \(10\) kph. Minnie goes from town \(A\) to town \(B\), a distance of \(10\) km all uphill, then from town \(B\) to town \(C\), a distance of \(15\) km all downhill, and then back to town \(A\), a distance of \(20\) km on the flat. Penny goes the other way around using the same route. How many more minutes does it take Minnie to complete the \(45\)-km ride than it takes Penny?
q_zh: Minnie在平路以20公里/小时骑行，下坡30公里/小时，上坡5公里/小时。Penny在平路以30公里/小时骑行，下坡40公里/小时，上坡10公里/小时。Minnie从A镇到B镇10公里全是上坡，从B镇到C镇15公里全是下坡，然后从C镇返回A镇20公里是平路。Penny走同样的路线但方向相反。Minnie完成45公里骑行比Penny多花多少分钟？

title: 第175题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Joy has \(30\) thin rods, one each of every integer length from \(1\) cm through \(30\) cm. She places the rods with lengths \(3\) cm, \(7\) cm, and \(15\) cm on a table. She then wants to choose a fourth rod that she can put with these three to form a quadrilateral with positive area. How many of the remaining rods can she choose as the fourth rod?
q_zh: Joy有30根细棒，长度分别为1厘米到30厘米的每个整数。她把3厘米、7厘米和15厘米的棒放在桌上。然后她想选一根第四根棒，与这三根一起组成一个有正面积的四边形。她可以从剩下的棒中选多少根作为第四根棒？

title: 第176题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The region consisting of all points in three-dimensional space within 3 units of line segment \(\overline{AB}\) has volume 216π. What is the length \(\overline{AB}\)?
q_zh: 三维空间中所有在线段\(\overline{AB}\)的3个单位范围内的区域体积为216π。求\(\overline{AB}\)的长度。

title: 第177题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Let \(S\) be a set of points \((x,y)\) in the coordinate plane such that two of the three quantities \(3\), \(x + 2\), and \(y - 4\) are equal and the third of the three quantities is no greater than this common value. Which of the following is a correct description for \(S\)?
q_zh: 设\(S\)是坐标平面上满足以下条件的点\((x,y)\)的集合：三个量\(3\)、\(x + 2\)和\(y - 4\)中有两个相等，第三个不大于这个共同值。以下哪个是\(S\)的正确描述？
options: C. three lines whose pairwise intersections are three distinct points
E. three rays with a common endpoint

title: 第178题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: What is the largest number of solid \(2\text{ in.}\) by \(2\text{ in.}\) by \(1\text{ in.}\) blocks that can fit in a \(3\text{ in.}\) by \(2\text{ in.}\) by \(3\text{ in.}\) box?
q_zh: 一个\(3\text{英寸} \times 2\text{英寸} \times 3\text{英寸}\)的盒子里最多能放多少个\(2\text{英寸} \times 2\text{英寸} \times 1\text{英寸}\)的实心块？

title: 第179题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Samia set off on her bicycle to visit her friend, traveling at an average speed of 17 kilometers per hour. When she had gone half the distance to her friend's house, a tire went flat, and she walked the rest of the way at 5 kilometers per hour. In all it took her 44 minutes to reach her friend's house. In kilometers rounded to the nearest tenth, how far did Samia walk?
q_zh: Samia骑自行车去看她的朋友，平均速度为17公里/小时。当她走到朋友家一半距离时，轮胎爆了，剩下的路程她步行，速度为5公里/小时。整个路程她用了44分钟到达朋友家。四舍五入到最接近的十分之一公里，Samia步行了多少公里？

title: 第180题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Points \(A(11, 9)\) and \(B(2, -3)\) are vertices of \(\triangle ABC\) with \(AB = AC\). The altitude from \(A\) meets the opposite side at \(D(-1, 3)\). What are the coordinates of point \(C\)?
q_zh: 点\(A(11, 9)\)和\(B(2, -3)\)是\(\triangle ABC\)的顶点，且\(AB = AC\)。从\(A\)到底边的垂线与对边相交于\(D(-1, 3)\)。点\(C\)的坐标是什么？

title: 第181题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The lines with equations \(ax - 2y = c\) and \(2x + by = -c\) are perpendicular and intersect at \((1, -5)\). What is \(c\)?
q_zh: 方程为\(ax - 2y = c\)和\(2x + by = -c\)的两条直线垂直，并在\((1, -5)\)处相交。求\(c\)。

title: 第182题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Elmer's new car gives \(50\%\) better fuel efficiency. However, the new car uses diesel fuel, which is \(20\%\) more expensive per liter than the gasoline the old car used. By what percent will Elmer save money if he uses his new car instead of his old car for a long trip?
q_zh: Elmer的新车燃油效率提高了50%。然而，新车使用柴油，每升比旧车使用的汽油贵20%。如果他跑很长一段路，用新车代替旧车，能节省百分之多少的钱？

title: 第183题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: A rectangular box has integer side lengths in the ratio \(1:3:4\). Which of the following could be the volume of the box?
q_zh: 一个长方体的边长为整数，比例为\(1:3:4\)。以下哪个可能是该长方体的体积？

title: 第184题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: A rug is made with three different colors as shown. The areas of the three differently colored regions form an arithmetic progression. The inner rectangle is one foot wide, and each of the two shaded regions is 1 foot wide on all four sides. What is the length in feet of the inner rectangle?
q_zh: 如图所示，一张地毯由三种不同颜色组成。三个不同颜色区域的面积构成等差数列。内侧矩形宽1英尺，两个阴影区域在四周各宽1英尺。内侧矩形的长度是多少英尺？

title: 第185题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Find the area of the shaded region.
q_zh: 求阴影区域的面积。

title: 第186题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: All three vertices of \(\triangle ABC\) are lying on the parabola defined by \(y = x^{2}\), with \(A\) at the origin and \(BC\) parallel to the \(x\)-axis. The area of the triangle is \(64\). What is the length of \(BC\)?
q_zh: \(\triangle ABC\)的三个顶点都在抛物线\(y = x^{2}\)上，其中\(A\)在原点，\(BC\)平行于x轴。三角形的面积是64。\(BC\)的长度是多少？

title: 第187题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: A thin piece of wood of uniform density in the shape of an equilateral triangle with side length \(3\) inches weighs \(12\) ounces. A second piece of the same type of wood, with the same thickness, also in the shape of an equilateral triangle, has side length of \(5\) inches. Which of the following is closest to the weight, in ounces, of the second piece?
q_zh: 一块均匀密度的薄木片，形状为边长3英寸的等边三角形，重量为12盎司。另一块相同类型、相同厚度的木片，也是等边三角形，边长为5英寸。以下哪个最接近第二块木片的重量（盎司）？

title: 第188题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Sola decided to fence in his rectangular garden. He bought \(20\) fence posts, placed one on each of the four corners, and spaced out the rest evenly along the edges of the garden, leaving exactly \(4\) yards between neighboring posts. The longer side of his garden, including the corners, has twice as many posts as the shorter side, including the corners. What is the area, in square yards, of Sola's garden?
q_zh: Sola决定用栅栏围起他的矩形花园。他买了20根栅栏柱，在四个角各放一根，其余的均匀分布在花园边缘，相邻柱子之间恰好相隔4码。他花园的长边（包括角上的柱子）的柱子数量是短边（包括角上的柱子）的两倍。Sola花园的面积是多少平方码？

title: 第189题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: A box contains a collection of triangular and square tiles. There are 25 tiles in the box, containing 84 edges total. How many square tiles are there in the box?
q_zh: 一个盒子里装有若干三角形瓷砖和正方形瓷砖，瓷砖总数为25块，这些瓷砖的总边数为84条。问盒子里有多少块正方形瓷砖？

title: 第190题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Two right circular cylinders have the same volume. The radius of the second cylinder is 10% more than the radius of the first. What is the relationship between the heights of the two cylinders?
q_zh: 两个直圆柱体的体积相等。第二个圆柱的半径比第一个圆柱的半径多10%。则两圆柱的高之间存在怎样的关系？
options: A. The second height is 10% less than the first.
B. The first height is 10% more than the second.
C. The second height is 21% less than the first.
D. The first height is 21% more than the second.
E. The second height is 80% of the first.

title: 第191题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: The ratio of the length to the width of a rectangle is \(4:3\). If the rectangle has diagonal of length \(d\), then the area may be expressed as \(kd^{2}\) for some constant \(k\). What is \(k\)?
q_zh: 某矩形的长宽比为 \(4:3\)。若该矩形的对角线长为 \(d\)，则其面积可以表示为 \(kd^{2}\)（其中 \(k\) 为常数）。求 \(k\) 的值。

title: 第192题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Points \((\sqrt{\pi}, a)\) and \((\sqrt{\pi}, b)\) are distinct points on the graph of \(y^{2}+x^{4}=2 x^{2} y+1\). What is \(|a-b|\)?
q_zh: 点 \((\sqrt{\pi}, a)\) 和点 \((\sqrt{\pi}, b)\) 是方程 \(y^{2}+x^{4}=2 x^{2} y+1\) 所确定曲线上两个不同的点。求 \(|a-b|\) 的值。

title: 第193题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Marley practices exactly one sport each day of the week. She runs three days a week but never on two consecutive days. On Monday she plays basketball and two days later golf. She swims and plays tennis, but she never plays tennis the day after running or swimming. Which day of the week does Marley swim?
q_zh: Marley每周恰好每天练习一项运动。她每周跑步三天，但从不连续两天跑步。星期一她打篮球，两天后打高尔夫。她游泳和打网球，但她从不在跑步或游泳后的第二天打网球。Marley星期几游泳？

title: 第194题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Consider the operation "minus the reciprocal of," defined by \(a \diamond b = a - \dfrac{1}{b}\). What is \((1 \diamond 2) \diamond 3 - 1 \diamond (2 \diamond 3)\)?
q_zh: 考虑运算"减去倒数的"，定义为 \(a \diamond b = a - \dfrac{1}{b}\)。求 \((1 \diamond 2) \diamond 3 - 1 \diamond (2 \diamond 3)\) 的值。

title: 第195题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
