In the second round Raashan has no money to give, but Sylvia and Ted might choose each other to give their $1 to, and the holdings will be the same at the end of the second round.)
q_zh: Raashan、Sylvia和Ted玩以下游戏。每个人开始时有1美元。每隔15秒铃响一次，此时每个有钱的玩家同时独立且随机地选择另外两名玩家中的一人，给该玩家1美元。铃响2019次后，每个人都有1美元的概率是多少？（例如，Raashan和Ted可能各自决定给Sylvia 1美元，而Sylvia可能决定把她的美元给Ted，此时Raashan将有0美元，Sylvia将有2美元，Ted将有1美元，这就是第一轮的结束。在第二轮中Raashan没有钱可以给，但Sylvia和Ted可能选择互相给对方1美元，因此在第二轮结束时各人的持有金额将相同。）

title: 第556题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: A number \(m\) is randomly selected from the set \(\{11,13,15,17,19\}\), and a number \(n\) is randomly selected from \(\{1999,2000,2001,\dots,2018\}\). What is the probability that \(m^n\) has a units digit of 1?

title: 第557题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: Three young brother-sister pairs from different families need to take a trip in a van. These six children will occupy the second and third rows in the van, each of which has three seats. To avoid disruptions, siblings may not sit right next to each other in the same row, and no child may sit directly in front of his or her sibling. How many seating arrangements are possible for this trip?
q_zh: 三个来自不同家庭的年轻兄妹组合需要乘坐一辆面包车旅行。这六个孩子将坐在面包车的第二排和第三排，每排有三个座位。为了避免打扰，同一排中兄弟姐妹不能相邻而坐，且任何一个孩子都不能坐在自己兄弟姐妹的正前方。这次旅行共有多少种座位安排？

title: 第558题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: Real numbers \(x\) and \(y\) are chosen independently and uniformly at random from the interval \([0,1]\). Which of the following numbers is closest to the probability that \(x,y,\) and \(1\) are the side lengths of an obtuse triangle?
q_zh: 实数\(x\)和\(y\)独立且均匀地从区间\([0,1]\)中随机选取。下列哪个数最接近\(x\)、\(y\)和1能构成钝角三角形三边的概率？

title: 第559题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Every week Roger pays for a movie ticket and a soda out of his allowance. Last week, Roger's allowance was \(A\) dollars. The cost of his movie ticket was \(20\%\) of the difference between \(A\) and the cost of his soda, while the cost of his soda was \(5\%\) of the difference between \(A\) and the cost of his movie ticket. To the nearest whole percent, what fraction of \(A\) did Roger pay for his movie ticket and soda?
q_zh: Roger每周用他的零花钱买一张电影票和一杯汽水。上周，Roger的零花钱是\(A\)美元。他的电影票价格是\(A\)与汽水价格之差的\(20\%\)，而汽水价格是\(A\)与电影票价格之差的\(5\%\)。四舍五入到最接近的整数百分比，Roger用\(A\)美元中的多少百分比支付了电影票和汽水？

title: 第560题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Chloé chooses a real number uniformly at random from the interval \([0,2017]\). Independently, Laurent chooses a real number uniformly at random from the interval \([0,4034]\). What is the probability that Laurent's number is greater than Chloé's number?
q_zh: Chloé从区间\([0,2017]\)中均匀随机选择一个实数。独立地，Laurent从区间\([0,4034]\)中均匀随机选择一个实数。Laurent的数大于Chloé的数的概率是多少？

title: 第561题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: There are 10 horses, named Horse 1, Horse 2, …, Horse 10. They get their names from how many minutes it takes them to run one lap around a circular race track: Horse \(k\) runs one lap in exactly \(k\) minutes. At time 0 all the horses are together at the starting point on the track. The horses start running in the same direction, and they keep running around the circular track at their constant speeds. The least time \(S \gt  0\), in minutes, at which all 10 horses will again simultaneously be at the starting point is \(S = 2520\). Let \(T \gt  0\) be the least time, in minutes, such that at least 5 of the horses are again at the starting point. What is the sum of the digits of \(T\)?
q_zh: 有10匹马，分别名为Horse 1、Horse 2、…、Horse 10。它们的名字来源于它们绕圆形赛道跑一圈所需的分钟数：Horse \(k\)恰好需要\(k\)分钟跑一圈。在时刻0，所有马都在赛道起点处。它们以相同的方向开始跑，并保持恒定速度绕圈跑。所有10匹马再次同时到达起点的最小时间\(S \gt  0\)（以分钟计）是\(S = 2520\)。设\(T \gt  0\)为最小时间（分钟），使得至少5匹马再次在起点处。求\(T\)的数位之和。

title: 第562题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: Amelia has a coin that lands heads with probability \(\dfrac{1}{3}\), and Blaine has a coin that lands on heads with probability \(\dfrac{2}{5}\). Amelia and Blaine alternately toss their coins until someone gets a head; the first one to get a head wins. All coin tosses are independent. Amelia goes first. The probability that Amelia wins is \(\dfrac{p}{q}\), where \(p\) and \(q\) are relatively prime positive integers. What is \(q - p\)?
q_zh: Amelia有一枚正面朝上概率为\(\dfrac{1}{3}\)的硬币，Blaine有一枚正面朝上概率为\(\dfrac{2}{5}\)的硬币。Amelia和Blaine交替掷硬币，直到有人掷出正面；第一个掷出正面的人获胜。所有硬币投掷都是独立的。Amelia先掷。Amelia获胜的概率是\(\dfrac{p}{q}\)，其中\(p\)和\(q\)是互质的正整数。求\(q - p\)。

title: 第563题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: Alice refuses to sit next to either Bob or Carla. Derek refuses to sit next to Eric. How many ways are there for the five of them to sit in a row of 5 chairs under these conditions?
q_zh: Alice拒绝坐在Bob或Carla旁边。Derek拒绝坐在Eric旁边。在这些条件下，他们五个人坐在一排5把椅子上的方法有多少种？

title: 第564题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: An integer \(N\) is selected at random in the range \(1 \le N \le 2020\). What is the probability that the remainder when \(N^{16}\) is divided by 5 is 1?
q_zh: 随机选择一个范围在\(1 \le N \le 2020\)内的整数\(N\)。\(N^{16}\)除以5的余数为1的概率是多少？

title: 第565题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Five friends sat in a movie theater in a row containing 5 seats, numbered 1 to 5 from left to right. (The directions "left" and "right" are from the point of view of the people as they sit in the seats.) During the movie Ada went to the lobby to get some popcorn. When she returned, she found that Bea had moved two seats to the right, Ceci had moved one seat to the left, and Dee and Edie had switched seats, leaving an end seat for Ada. In which seat had Ada been sitting before she got up?
q_zh: 五个朋友坐在电影院一排5个座位上，从左到右编号1到5。（"左"和"右"是从坐着的人的视角来看的。）电影放映期间，Ada去大厅拿爆米花。当她回来时，她发现Bea向右移动了两个座位，Ceci向左移动了一个座位，Dee和Edie互换了座位，给Ada留下了一个靠边的座位。Ada起来之前坐在哪个座位上？

title: 第566题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: Let \(N\) be a positive multiple of 5. One red ball and \(N\) green balls are arranged in a line in random order. Let \(P(N)\) be the probability that at least \(\dfrac{3}{5}\) of the green balls are on the same side of the red ball. Observe that \(P(5) = 1\) and that \(P(N)\) approaches \(\dfrac{4}{5}\) as \(N\) grows large. What is the sum of the digits of the least value of \(N\) such that \(P(N) < \dfrac{321}{400}\)?
q_zh: 设\(N\)是正整数且是5的倍数。1个红球和\(N\)个绿球随机排成一行。设\(P(N)\)为绿球中至少有\(\dfrac{3}{5}\)在红球同一侧的概率。注意到\(P(5) = 1\)，且当\(N\)增大时\(P(N)\)趋近于\(\dfrac{4}{5}\)。使\(P(N) < \dfrac{321}{400}\)成立的最小\(N\)的数位之和是多少？

title: 第567题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: A set of teams held a round-robin tournament in which every team played every other team exactly once. Every team won \(10\) games and lost \(10\) games; there were no ties. How many sets of three teams \(\{A,B,C\}\) were there in which \(A\) beat \(B\), \(B\) beat \(C\), and \(C\) beat \(A\)?
q_zh: 一组队伍进行单循环比赛，每支队伍与其他每支队伍恰好比赛一次。每支队伍赢了10场输了10场，没有平局。有多少个三元队\(\{A,B,C\}\)满足\(A\)赢了\(B\)，\(B\)赢了\(C\)，且\(C\)赢了\(A\)？

title: 第568题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: Claudia has 12 coins, each of which is a 5-cent coin or a 10-cent coin. There are exactly 17 different values that can be obtained as combinations of one or more of her coins. How many 10-cent coins does Claudia have?
q_zh: 克劳迪娅有12枚硬币，每枚要么是5分硬币，要么是10分硬币。用她的一部分或全部硬币（至少选1枚）可以凑出恰好17种不同的面值。问克劳迪娅有多少枚10分硬币？

title: 第570题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: Eight people are sitting around a circular table, each holding a fair coin. All eight people flip their coins and those who flip heads stand while those who flip tails remain seated. What is the probability that no two adjacent people will stand?
q_zh: 8个人围坐在一张圆桌旁，每人手中各持一枚均匀硬币。同时抛掷硬币，抛出正面的人起立，抛出反面的人坐着。求"没有任何两个相邻的人同时起立"的概率。

title: 第571题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: The town of Hamlet has 3 people for each horse, 4 sheep for each cow, and 3 ducks for each person. Which of the following could not possibly be the total number of people, horses, sheep, cows, and ducks in Hamlet?
q_zh: Hamlet镇每匹马有3人，每头牛有4只羊，每人养3只鸭。以下哪一项不可能是Hamlet镇的人口、马匹、羊、牛和鸭的总数？

title: 第572题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: Al, Bill, and Cal will each randomly be assigned a whole number from 1 to 10 inclusive, with no two of them getting the same number. What is the probability that Al's number will be a whole number multiple of Bill's and Bill's number will be a whole number multiple of Cal's?
q_zh: Al、Bill和Cal每人被随机分配一个1到10（含）之间的整数，且没有两个人得到相同的数字。Al的数字是Bill的数字的整数倍，且Bill的数字是Cal的数字的整数倍的概率是多少？

title: 第573题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.3
q_en: Johann has 64 fair coins. He flips all the coins. Any coin that lands on tails is tossed again. Coins that land on tails on the second toss are tossed a third time. What is the expected number of coins that are now heads?
q_zh: Johann有64枚均匀硬币。他掷所有硬币。任何掷出背面的硬币再掷一次。第二次掷出背面的硬币再掷第三次。现在正面朝上的硬币的期望数量是多少？

title: 第574题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Ant Amelia starts on the number line at \(0\) and crawls in the following manner. For \(n=1,2,3\), Amelia chooses a time duration \(t_n\) and an increment \(x_n\) independently and uniformly at random from the interval \((0,1)\). During the \(n\)th step of the process, Amelia moves \(x_n\) units in the positive direction, using up \(t_n\) minutes. If the total elapsed time has exceeded \(1\) minute during the \(n\)th step, she stops at the end of that step; otherwise, she continues with the next step, taking at most \(3\) steps in all. What is the probability that Amelia\'s position when she stops will be greater than \(1\)?
q_zh: 蚂蚁 Amelia 从数轴上的 \(0\) 点开始，按以下方式爬行。对于 \(n=1,2,3\)，Amelia 独立地、均匀地从区间 \((0,1)\) 中随机选择一段时间 \(t_n\) 和一个增量 \(x_n\)。在过程的第 \(n\) 步中，她向正方向移动 \(x_n\) 个单位，耗时 \(t_n\) 分钟。如果在第 \(n\) 步期间总耗时超过 \(1\) 分钟，她在该步结束时停止；否则她继续下一步，最多共进行 \(3\) 步。当她停止时，她的位置大于 \(1\) 的概率是多少？

title: 第575题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: In the following list of numbers, the integer \(n\) appears \(n\) times in the list for \(1 \le n \le 200\): \[1, 2, 2, 3, 3, 3, 4, 4, 4, 4, \dots, 200, 200, \dots , 200\] What is the median of the numbers in this list?
q_zh: 在以下数字列表中，整数\(n\)在列表中恰好出现\(n\)次（对于\(1 \le n \le 200\)）：\[1, 2, 2, 3, 3, 3, 4, 4, 4, 4, \dots, 200, 200, \dots, 200.\] 这个数字列表的中位数是多少？

title: 第576题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: In how many ways can the sequence \(1, 2, 3, 4, 5\) be rearranged so that no three consecutive terms are increasing and no three consecutive terms are decreasing?
q_zh: 有多少种方式可以重新排列序列\(1, 2, 3, 4, 5\)，使得没有任何三个连续项递增，也没有三个连续项递减？

title: 第577题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Frieda the frog begins a sequence of hops on a \(3 \times 3\) grid of squares, moving one square on each hop and choosing at random the direction of each hop—up, down, left, or right. She does not hop diagonally. When the direction of a hop would take Frieda off the grid, she "wraps around" and jumps to the opposite edge. For example if Frieda begins in the center square and makes two hops "up", the first hop would place her in the top row middle square, and the second hop would cause Frieda to jump to the opposite edge, landing in the bottom row middle square. Suppose Frieda starts from the center square, makes at most four hops at random, and stops hopping if she lands on a corner square. What is the probability that she reaches a corner square on one of the four hops?
q_zh: 青蛙弗丽达在一个\(3\times 3\)的方格网格上开始一系列跳跃，每次跳跃移动一个方格，随机选择上、下、左、右四个方向之一。她不能对角跳跃。当跳跃方向会使弗丽达离开网格时，她会"环绕"并跳到对边。例如，如果弗丽达从中心方格开始，连续向上跳两次，第一次跳跃会使她到达顶部中间方格，第二次跳跃会使她跳到对边，落在底部中间方格。假设弗丽达从中心方格出发，随机最多跳四次，如果落在角落方格就停止跳跃。她在四次跳跃中的某一次到达角落方格的概率是多少？

title: 第578题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: How many ways are there to place 3 indistinguishable red chips, 3 indistinguishable blue chips, and 3 indistinguishable green chips in the squares of a \(3 \times 3\) grid so that no two chips of the same color are directly adjacent to each other, either vertically or horizontally?
q_zh: 有多少种方式可以在一个\(3\times 3\)的网格方格中放置3个不可区分的红棋子、3个不可区分的蓝棋子和3个不可区分的绿棋子，使得同色的两个棋子彼此之间不存在垂直或水平方向上的直接相邻？

title: 第579题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Ravon, Oscar, Aditi, Tyrone, and Kim play a card game. Each person is given 2 cards out of a set of 10 cards numbered \(1, 2, 3, \dots, 10\). The score of a player is the sum of the numbers of their cards. The scores of the players are as follows: Ravon—11, Oscar—4, Aditi—7, Tyrone—16, Kim—17. Which of the following statements is true?
q_zh: 拉文、奥斯卡、阿迪蒂、泰隆和金玩一种纸牌游戏。每个人从编号为\(1, 2, 3, \dots, 10\)的10张牌中抽出2张牌。玩家的得分是其两张牌上数字之和。玩家的得分如下：拉文—11，奥斯卡—4，阿迪蒂—7，泰隆—16，金—17。以下哪项陈述是正确的？

title: 第580题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: A fair 6-sided die is repeatedly rolled until an odd number appears. What is the probability that every even number appears at least once before the first occurrence of an odd number?
q_zh: 反复掷一枚均匀的六面骰子，直到出现奇数。在第一次出现奇数之前，每个偶数都至少出现一次的概率是多少？

title: 第581题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Arjun and Beth play a game in which they take turns removing one brick or two adjacent bricks from one "wall" among a set of several walls of bricks, with gaps possibly creating new walls. The walls are one brick tall. For example, a set of walls of sizes 4 and 2 can be changed into any of the following by one move: \((3,2)\), \((2,1,2)\), \((4)\), \((4,1)\), \((2,2)\), or \((1,1,2)\). Arjun plays first, and the player who removes the last brick wins. For which starting configuration is there a strategy that guarantees a win for Beth?
q_zh: 阿俊和贝丝玩一个游戏，他们轮流从由若干面墙组成的砖墙中移除一块砖或两块相邻的砖（来自同一面墙），间隙可能产生新的墙。墙的高度为一块砖的高度。例如，一组长度为4和2的两面墙可以通过一步变成以下任何一种情况：\((3,2)\)、\((2,1,2)\)、\((4)\)、\((4,1)\)、\((2,2)\)或\((1,1,2)\)。阿俊先走，移除最后一块砖的玩家获胜。对于以下哪种起始布局，贝丝有策略保证获胜？

title: 第582题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Jason rolls three fair standard six-sided dice. Then he looks at the rolls and chooses a subset of the dice (possibly empty, possibly all three dice) to reroll. After rerolling, he wins if and only if the sum of the numbers face up on the three dice is exactly 7. Jason always plays to optimize his chances of winning. What is the probability that he chooses to reroll exactly two of the dice?
q_zh: Jason掷三个均匀的标准六面骰子。然后他查看掷骰子的结果，选择一个骰子子集（可能为空，可能包含所有三个骰子）重新掷。重新掷骰子后，当且仅当三个骰子朝上面的数字之和恰好为7时，他获胜。Jason总是选择最优策略以最大化获胜机会。他选择恰好重新掷两个骰子的概率是多少？

title: 第583题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Travis has to babysit the terrible Thompson triplets. Knowing that they love big numbers, Travis devises a counting game for them. First Tadd will say the number 1, then Todd must say the next two numbers (2 and 3), then Tucker must say the next three numbers (4, 5, 6), then Tadd must say the next four numbers (7, 8, 9, 10), and the process continues to rotate through the three children in order, each saying one more number than the previous child did, until the number 10,000 is reached. What is the 2019th number said by Tadd?
q_zh: Travis必须照顾可怕的Thompson三胞胎。他们喜欢大数字，Travis为他们设计了一个计数游戏。首先Tadd说数字1，然后Todd必须说接下来的两个数字（2和3），然后Tucker必须说接下来的三个数字（4、5、6），然后Tadd必须说接下来的四个数字（7、8、9、10），这个过程继续轮流在三个孩子之间进行，每个孩子说的数字比前一个孩子多一个，直到达到数字10000。Tadd说的第2019个数字是多少？

title: 第584题 <span class="diff-badge diff-hard">0.1
q_en: Last year Isabella took 7 math tests and received 7 different scores, each an integer between 91 and 100, inclusive. After each test she noticed that the average of her test scores was an integer. Her score on the seventh test was 95. What was her score on the sixth test?
q_zh: 去年Isabella参加了7次数学考试，得到了7个不同的分数，每个分数都是91到100（含）之间的整数。每次考试后她注意到她的考试分数的平均值是一个整数。她第七次考试的分数是95。她第六次考试的分数是多少？

title: 第585题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: Suzanne went to the bank and withdrew \(\$800\). The teller gave her this amount using \(\$20\) bills, \(\$50\) bills, and \(\$100\) bills, with at least one of each denomination. How many different collections of bills could Suzanne have received?
q_zh: Suzanne去银行取了\(\$800\)。出纳员用\(\$20\)、\(\$50\)和\(\$100\)面额的纸币给了她这笔钱，每种面额至少一张。Suzanne可能收到多少种不同的纸币组合？

title: 第586题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Mike cycled 15 laps in 57 minutes. Assume he cycled at a constant speed throughout. Approximately how many laps did he complete in the first 27 minutes?
q_zh: 迈克骑自行车57分钟骑了15圈。假设他全程匀速骑行。前27分钟他大约骑了多少圈？

title: 第587题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: Which expression is equal to \(\left|a-2-\sqrt{(a-1)^2}\right|\) for \(a\lt 0\)?
q_zh: 对于 \(a\lt 0\)，哪个表达式等于 \(\left|a-2-\sqrt{(a-1)^2}\right|\)？

title: 第588题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: On Halloween, \(31\) children walked into the principal\'s office asking for candy. They can be classified into three types: Some always lie; some always tell the truth; and some alternately lie and tell the truth. The alternaters arbitrarily choose their first response, either a lie or the truth, but each subsequent statement has the opposite truth value from its predecessor. The principal asked everyone the same three questions in this order. "Are you a truth-teller?" The principal gave a piece of candy to each of the \(22\) children who answered yes. "Are you an alternater?" The principal gave a piece of candy to each of the \(15\) children who answered yes. "Are you a liar?" The principal gave a piece of candy to each of the \(9\) children who answered yes. How many pieces of candy in all did the principal give to the children who always tell the truth?
q_zh: 万圣节那天，\(31\) 名孩子走进校长办公室要糖果。他们可以分为三类：有些总是说谎；有些总是说实话；有些交替说谎和说实话。交替者任意选择第一个回答（说谎或说实话），但此后每个陈述的真假值都与其前一个相反。校长按顺序问了每个人同样的三个问题。"你是说实话的人吗？" 有 \(22\) 名孩子回答"是"，校长给每人一块糖果。"你是交替者吗？" 有 \(15\) 名孩子回答"是"，校长给每人一块糖果。"你是说谎的人吗？" 有 \(9\) 名孩子回答"是"，校长给每人一块糖果。校长总共给总是说实话的孩子多少块糖果？

title: 第589题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.5
q_en: All the high schools in a large school district are involved in a fundraiser selling T-shirts. Which of the choices below is logically equivalent to the statement "No school bigger than Euclid HS sold more T-shirts than Euclid HS"?
q_zh: 一个大校区的所有高中都参与了T恤义卖。以下哪个选项在逻辑上等同于"没有比Euclid高中更大的学校卖出比Euclid高中更多的T恤"这一陈述？
options: A. All schools smaller than Euclid HS sold fewer T-shirts than Euclid HS.
B. No school that sold more T-shirts than Euclid HS is bigger than Euclid HS.
C. All schools bigger than Euclid HS sold fewer T-shirts than Euclid HS.
D. All schools that sold fewer T-shirts than Euclid HS are smaller than Euclid HS.
E. All schools smaller than Euclid HS sold more T-shirts than Euclid HS.

title: 第590题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: Portia's high school has 3 times as many students as Lara's high school. The two high schools have a total of 2600 students. How many students does Portia's high school have?
q_zh: 波西亚的高中学生人数是拉拉的高中学生人数的3倍。这两所高中共有2600名学生。波西亚的高中有多少名学生？

title: 第591题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.9
q_en: At a math contest, 57 students are wearing blue shirts, and another 75 students are wearing yellow shirts. The 132 students are assigned into 66 pairs. In exactly 23 of these pairs, both students are wearing blue shirts. In how many pairs are both students wearing yellow shirts?
q_zh: 在一场数学竞赛中，有57名学生穿着蓝色衬衫，另有75名学生穿着黄色衬衫。这132名学生被分配成66对。其中恰好有23对双方都穿蓝色衬衫。有多少对双方都穿黄色衬衫？

title: 第592题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: In a high school with 500 students, 40% of the seniors play a musical instrument, while 30% of the non-seniors do not play a musical instrument. In all, 46.8% of the students do not play a musical instrument. How many non-seniors play a musical instrument?
q_zh: 在一所有500名学生的高中，40%的高三学生演奏乐器，30%的非高三学生不演奏乐器。总共有46.8%的学生不演奏乐器。有多少非高三学生演奏乐器？

title: 第593题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.6
q_en: At a gathering of \(30\) people, there are \(20\) people who all know each other and \(10\) people who know no one. People who know each other hug, and people who do not know each other shake hands. How many handshakes occur?
q_zh: 在一个有30人的聚会上，有20人彼此相识，10人互不相识。相识的人互相拥抱，不相识的人互相握手。这个团体里发生了多少次握手？

title: 第594题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: Camilla had twice as many blueberry jelly beans as cherry jelly beans. After eating 10 pieces of each kind, she now has three times as many blueberry jelly beans as cherry jelly beans. How many blueberry jelly beans did she originally have?
q_zh: Camilla的蓝莓软糖数量是樱桃软糖的两倍。吃了每种各10颗后，她现在有的蓝莓软糖是樱桃软糖的三倍。她原来有多少颗蓝莓软糖？

title: 第595题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: For every dollar Ben spent on bagels, David spent 25 cents less. Ben paid $12.50 more than David. How much did they spend in the bagel store together?
q_zh: Ben每在贝果上花1美元，David就少花25美分。Ben比David多付了12.50美元。他们俩在贝果店一共花了多少钱？

title: 第596题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Ann made a 3-step staircase using 18 toothpicks as shown in the figure. How many toothpicks does she need to add to complete a 5-step staircase?
q_zh: 安用18根牙签按图示摆出了一个3级阶梯（每级用若干牙签搭建）。若要将阶梯扩展为5级，还需再增加多少根牙签？

title: 第597题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.8
q_en: Marie does three equally time-consuming tasks in a row without taking breaks. She begins the first task at 1:00 PM and finishes the second task at 2:40 PM. When does she finish the third task?
q_zh: 玛丽连续不间断地完成三个耗时相同的任务。她在下午1:00开始第一个任务，并在下午2:40完成第二个任务。她什么时候完成第三个任务？

title: 第598题 <span class="diff-badge diff-easy">0.7
q_en: David, Hikmet, Jack, Marta, Rand, and Todd were in a 12-person race with 6 other people. Rand finished 6 places ahead of Hikmet. Marta finished 1 place behind Jack. David finished 2 places behind Hikmet. Jack finished 2 places behind Todd. Todd finished 1 place behind Rand. Marta finished in 6th place. Who finished in 8th place?
q_zh: David, Hikmet, Jack, Marta, Rand和Todd参加了一个12人的比赛（他们6人加上其他6人）。Rand比Hikmet领先6个名次。Marta落后Jack 1个名次。David落后Hikmet 2个名次。Jack落后Todd 2个名次。Todd落后Rand 1个名次。Marta获得了第6名。谁获得了第8名？

title: 第599题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.2
q_en: Let
q_zh: 设\(P(m)\)由以下表达式定义。在\(P(2022)\)、\(P(2023)\)、\(P(2024)\)和\(P(2025)\)这四个值中，有多少个是整数？

title: 第600题 <span class="diff-badge diff-medium">0.4
q_en: There are 20 students participating in an after-school program offering classes in yoga, bridge, and painting. Each student must take at least one of these three classes, but may take two or all three. There are 10 students taking yoga, 13 taking bridge, and 9 taking painting. There are 9 students taking at least two classes. How many students are taking all three classes?
q_zh: 有20名学生参加一个提供瑜伽、桥牌和绘画课程的课外项目。每个学生必须至少选修其中一门课程，但可以选修两门或全部三门。有10名学生选瑜伽，13名选桥牌，9名选绘画。有9名学生至少选了两门课程。有多少名学生选修了全部三门课程？
